30219.title: Screening Adaptive Cartels
30219.authors: Juan M. Ortner, Sylvain Chassang, Kei Kawai, Jun Nakabayashi
30219.abstract: We propose an equilibrium theory of data-driven antitrust oversight in which regulators launch investigations on the basis of suspicious bidding patterns and cartels can adapt to the statistical screens used by regulators. We emphasize the use of asymptotically safe tests, i.e. tests that are passed with probability approaching one by competitive firms, regardless of the underlying economic environment. Our main result establishes that screening for collusion with safe tests is a robust improvement over laissez-faire. Safe tests do not create new collusive equilibria, and do not hurt competitive industries. In addition, safe tests can have strict bite, including unraveling all collusive equilibria in some settings. We provide evidence that cartel adaptation to regulatory oversight is a real concern.
30219.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个数据驱动的反垄断监管的均衡理论，其中监管机构基于可疑的投标模式发起调查，而卡特尔可以适应监管机构使用的统计筛选方法。我们强调使用渐近安全检验，即无论潜在经济环境如何，竞争性企业以趋近于一的概率通过的检验。我们的主要结果表明，使用安全检验筛选合谋是对自由放任的稳健改进。安全检验不会创造新的合谋均衡，也不会损害竞争性行业。此外，安全检验可以产生严格效力，包括在某些情况下瓦解所有合谋均衡。我们提供证据表明，卡特尔对监管监督的适应性是一个真实的问题。
30219.meta: Programs：IO, PE；JEL：C57, C72, D44, H57, L4

30218.title: Using Divide-and-Conquer to Improve Tax Collection
30218.zh_title: 利用分而治之策略改善税收征管
30218.authors: Samuel Kapon, Lucia Del Carpio, Sylvain Chassang
30218.abstract: Tax collection by capacity constrained governments may exhibit multiple equilibria: if delinquency is low, limited enforcement capacity is enough to discipline deviators; if delinquency is high, limited enforcement capacity is overstretched and no longer dissuasive. In principle, divide-and-conquer, a theoretically important but untested principle from mechanism design, can be used to unravel the undesirable high-delinquency equilibrium. We investigate the challenge of doing so in practice.\nOur preferred mechanism takes the form of Prioritized Iterative Enforcement (PIE). Tax-payers are assigned a rank trading-off expected collection and expected capacity use. Tax-payers are then iteratively threatened in small groups for which collection capacity is sufficient to induce compliance. After repayment occurs, unused collection capacity is released to issue the next round of threats.\nIn partnership with a district of Lima (Peru) we experimentally evaluate the impact of PIE on the collection of property taxes from 13432 tax-payers. Reduced-form evidence both validates and refines the theoretical benchmark. A structural model of tax-payer behavior suggests that, keeping the number of collection actions fixed, PIE would increase tax revenue by 11.3%.
30218.zh_abstract: 能力受限的政府的税收征管可能存在多重均衡：如果拖欠率低，有限的执法能力足以惩戒违规者；如果拖欠率高，有限的执法能力不堪重负，不再具有威慑力。原则上，分而治之——一个理论上重要但未经检验的机制设计原则——可以用来瓦解不理想的高拖欠率均衡。我们研究了在实践中实现这一目标的挑战。

30217.title: The Virtue of Complexity in Return Prediction
30217.zh_title: 回报预测中复杂性的价值
30217.authors: Bryan T. Kelly, Semyon Malamud, Kangying Zhou
30217.abstract: Much of the extant literature predicts market returns with “simple” models that use only a few parameters. Contrary to conventional wisdom, we theoretically prove that simple models severely understate return predictability compared to “complex” models in which the number of parameters exceeds the number of observations. We empirically document the virtue of complexity in US equity market return prediction. Our findings establish the rationale for modeling expected returns through machine learning.
30217.zh_abstract: 现有文献大多使用仅包含少数参数的“简单”模型来预测市场回报。与传统观点相反，我们从理论上证明，与参数数量超过观测数量的“复杂”模型相比，简单模型会严重低估回报的可预测性。我们通过实证记录了美国股票市场回报预测中复杂性的价值。我们的发现为通过机器学习建模预期回报提供了理论依据。

30216.title: Information Spillovers and Sovereign Debt: Theory Meets the Eurozone Crisis
30216.zh_title: 信息溢出与主权债务：理论与欧元区危机
30216.authors: Harold L. Cole, Guillermo Ordoñez, Daniel Neuhann
30216.abstract: We develop a theory of information spillovers in sovereign bond markets in which investors can acquire information about default risk before trading in primary and secondary markets. If primary markets are structured as multi-unit discriminatory-price auctions, an endogenous winner’s curse leads to strategic complementarities in information acquisition. As a result, shocks to default risk in one country may trigger crisis episodes with widespread information acquisition, sharp increases in the level and volatility of yields in risky countries, falling yields in safe countries, endogenous market segmentation, and arbitrage profits between primary and secondary markets. These predictions are consistent with the behavior of primary and secondary market yields, market segmentation, and measures of information acquisition during the Eurozone sovereign debt crisis.
30216.zh_abstract: 我们发展了一个主权债券市场信息溢出理论，其中投资者可以在一级和二级市场交易前获取关于违约风险的信息。如果一级市场被构建为多单位歧视性价格拍卖，则内生的赢家诅咒会导致信息获取中的策略互补性。因此，一国违约风险的冲击可能引发危机事件，表现为广泛的信息获取、风险国家收益率水平和波动率的急剧上升、安全国家收益率的下降、内生市场分割以及一级和二级市场之间的套利利润。这些预测与欧元区主权债务危机期间一级和二级市场收益率、市场分割以及信息获取指标的行为一致。

30215.title: The Privacy Elasticity of Behavior: Conceptualization and Application
30215.zh_title: 行为的隐私弹性：概念化与应用
30215.authors: Inbal Dekel, Rachel Cummings, Ori Heffetz, Katrina Ligett
30215.abstract: We propose and initiate the study of privacy elasticity—the responsiveness of economic variables to small changes in the level of privacy given to participants in an economic system. Individuals rarely experience either full privacy or a complete lack of privacy; we use differential privacy—a computer-science theory increasingly adopted by industry and government—as a standardized means of quantifying continuous privacy changes. The resulting privacy measure implies a privacy-elasticity notion that is portable and comparable across contexts. We discuss applications, and demonstrate the feasibility of this approach by estimating the privacy elasticity of public-good contributions in a lab experiment.
30215.zh_abstract: 我们提出并启动了隐私弹性的研究——即经济变量对经济系统中参与者所获隐私水平微小变化的响应程度。个体很少经历完全隐私或完全缺乏隐私；我们使用差分隐私——一种日益被行业和政府采用的计算机科学理论——作为量化连续隐私变化的标准化手段。由此产生的隐私度量隐含了一个可跨情境移植和比较的隐私弹性概念。我们讨论了应用，并通过在实验室实验中估计公共品贡献的隐私弹性来证明这种方法的可行性。

30214.title: Polarization and Public Policy: Political Adverse Selection under Obamacare
30214.zh_title: 极化与公共政策：奥巴马医改下的政治逆向选择
30214.authors: Leonardo Bursztyn, Jonathan T. Kolstad, Aakaash Rao, Pietro Tebaldi, Noam Yuchtman
30214.abstract: Politicizing policies designed to address market failures can diminish their effectiveness. We document a pattern of “political adverse selection” in the health insurance exchanges established under the Affordable Care Act (ACA; “Obamacare” in political debates): Republicans enrolled at lower rates than Democrats and independents, a gap driven by healthier Republicans. This selection raised public subsidy spending by approximately $\$124$ per enrollee annually (2.4% of average cost). We field a survey to show this selection does not exist for other insurance products. Lower enrollment and higher costs are concentrated in more Republican areas, potentially contributing to polarized views of the policy.
30214.zh_abstract: 将旨在解决市场失灵的政策政治化会削弱其有效性。我们在《平价医疗法案》（ACA；政治辩论中称为“奥巴马医改”）下建立的健康保险交易所中记录了一种“政治逆向选择”模式：共和党人的参保率低于民主党人和独立人士，这一差距由更健康的共和党人驱动。这种选择每年使每位参保人的公共补贴支出增加约124美元（占平均成本的2.4%）。我们进行了一项调查，表明这种选择在其他保险产品中并不存在。较低的参保率和较高的成本集中在共和党人较多的地区，可能加剧了对该政策的两极化看法。
30214.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE, POL；JEL：H0, I13, L38

30213.title: Can Fiscal Externalities Be Internalized?
30213.zh_title: 财政外部性能否被内部化？
30213.abstract: Subsidies and in-kind transfers give rise to negative fiscal externalities. However, internalizing negative fiscal externalities through taxation would undo the subsidy or in-kind transfer that caused them. Similarly, positive fiscal externalities cannot be internalized though government subsidies. This paper describes a mechanism that transfers fiscal externalities from the government to private parties. Such transfers generate incentives within the private sector to reduce inefficiencies caused by fiscal externalities. Thus, the paper offers a straightforward, but powerful, insight: transferring fiscal externalities to third parties extends the reach of the Coase Theorem to inefficiencies stemming from fiscal externalities.
30213.zh_abstract: 补贴和实物转移会产生负财政外部性。然而，通过税收来内部化负财政外部性会抵消导致这些外部性的补贴或实物转移。同样，正财政外部性也无法通过政府补贴来内部化。本文描述了一种将财政外部性从政府转移到私人部门的机制。这种转移在私人部门内部产生激励，以减少由财政外部性导致的低效率。因此，本文提供了一个直接但有力的见解：将财政外部性转移给第三方，将科斯定理的适用范围扩展到由财政外部性导致的低效率。

30212.title: Are Effective Teachers for Students with Disabilities Effective Teachers for All?
30212.zh_title: 对残疾学生有效的教师对所有学生都有效吗？
30212.authors: W. Jesse Wood, Ijun Lai, Neil R. Filosa, Scott A. Imberman, Nathan D. Jones, Katharine O. Strunk
30212.abstract: The success of many students with disabilities (SWDs) depends on access to high-quality general education teachers. Yet, most measures of teacher value-added measures (VAM) fail to distinguish between a teacher’s effectiveness in educating students with and without disabilities. We create two VAM measures: one focusing on teachers’ effectiveness in improving outcomes for SWDs, and one for non-SWDs. We find top-performing teachers for non-SWDs often have relatively lower VAMs for SWDs, and that SWDs sort to teachers with lower scores in both VAMs. Overall, SWD-specific VAMs may be more suitable for identifying which teachers have a history of effectiveness with SWDs and could play a role in ensuring that students are being optimally assigned to these teachers.
30212.zh_abstract: 许多残疾学生的成功取决于能否获得高质量的普通教育教师。然而，大多数教师增值衡量指标未能区分教师在教育残疾学生和非残疾学生方面的有效性。我们创建了两个增值衡量指标：一个关注教师改善残疾学生成果的有效性，另一个关注非残疾学生。我们发现，对非残疾学生表现最佳的教师，其对残疾学生的增值衡量指标通常相对较低，并且残疾学生会选择在两项增值衡量指标上得分都较低的教师。总体而言，针对残疾学生的增值衡量指标可能更适合识别哪些教师有对残疾学生有效的历史，并可能在确保学生被最优分配给这些教师方面发挥作用。

30211.title: u* = √uv
30211.abstract: Most governments are mandated to maintain their economies at full employment. We propose that the best marker of full employment is the efficient unemployment rate, u*. We define u* as the unemployment rate that minimizes the nonproductive use of labor—both jobseeking and recruiting. The nonproductive use of labor is well measured by the number of jobseekers and vacancies, u + v. Through the Beveridge curve, the number of vacancies is inversely related to the number of jobseekers. With such symmetry, the labor market is efficient when there are as many jobseekers as vacancies (u = v), too tight when there are more vacancies than jobseekers (v > u), and too slack when there are more jobseekers than vacancies (u > v). Accordingly, the efficient unemployment rate is the geometric average of the unemployment and vacancy rates: u* = √uv. We compute u* for the United States between 1930 and 2022. We find for instance that the US labor market has been over full employment (u < u*) since May 2021.
30211.zh_abstract: 大多数政府被授权维持其经济处于充分就业状态。我们提出，充分就业的最佳标志是有效失业率u*。我们将u*定义为最小化劳动力非生产性使用——包括求职和招聘——的失业率。劳动力的非生产性使用可以通过求职者和职位空缺的数量u+v很好地衡量。通过贝弗里奇曲线，职位空缺数量与求职者数量呈负相关。在这种对称性下，当求职者数量等于职位空缺数量（u=v）时，劳动力市场是有效的；当职位空缺多于求职者（v>u）时，市场过于紧张；当求职者多于职位空缺（u>v）时，市场过于松弛。因此，有效失业率是失业率和职位空缺率的几何平均值：u* = √uv。我们计算了1930年至2022年间美国的u*。例如，我们发现自2021年5月以来，美国劳动力市场一直处于过度充分就业状态（u < u*）。
30211.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME, PE；JEL：E24, E32, E52, E61, J63, J64

30210.title: Fed Implied Market Prices and Risk Premia
30210.zh_title: 美联储隐含的市场价格与风险溢价
30210.authors: Charles W. Calomiris, Joanna Harris, Harry Mamaysky, Cristina Tessari
30210.abstract: We introduce FDIF, a measure of Fed communication surprise based on the text of FOMC statements. FDIF measures the difference between text-implied and actual values of key market variables. Positive FDIF of countercyclical variables (e.g., credit spreads) is associated with negative macroeconomic forecast revisions; the opposite holds for procyclical variables. Industries that hedge bad FDIF news earn low returns on FOMC announcement days, but high returns on non-FOMC days. The opposite holds for FDIF-exposed industries, and the return differences are large. Controlling for FDIF exposure, rate-based policy surprise measures are not priced in the cross-section of industry returns.
30210.zh_abstract: 我们引入了FDIF，这是一种基于联邦公开市场委员会声明文本的美联储沟通意外度量。FDIF衡量了文本隐含的关键市场变量值与实际值之间的差异。逆周期变量（如信用利差）的正FDIF与负的宏观经济预测修正相关；顺周期变量则相反。对冲FDIF坏消息的行业在联邦公开市场委员会公告日获得低回报，但在非公告日获得高回报。暴露于FDIF的行业则相反，且回报差异很大。在控制FDIF暴露后，基于利率的政策意外度量在行业回报的横截面上不被定价。
30210.meta: Programs：AP, ME；JEL：E32, E44, E52, G1, G12

30209.title: Officer-Involved: The Media Language of Police Killings
30209.zh_title: 涉警事件：警察杀人案的媒体语言
30209.authors: Jonathan Moreno-Medina, Aurelie Ouss, Patrick Bayer, Bocar A. Ba
30209.abstract: This paper examines language patterns in US television news coverage of police killings. We first document that the media employ semantic structures that obfuscate responsibility—such as passive voice, nominalizations, and intransitive verbs—more frequently for police killings than for civilian killings. Using field variation and an online experiment, we demonstrate that these language differences matter. In the field, we find that people who happened to have taken a survey just after more obfuscatory coverage of a police killing are more likely to support police funding. In our online experiment, participants are less likely to hold police officers morally responsible and demand penalties when exposed to obfuscatory language, especially when the victim is unarmed. Returning to the news data, we find higher use of obfuscatory language when victims are unarmed, when video footage is available, or when the suspect is not fleeing—in other words, situations when obfuscation matters most. Turning to the causes of this differential obfuscation, our evidence is not consistent with either demand-side drivers or supply-side factors associated with TV station ownership and political leaning. Instead, our results point to original narratives crafted by police departments as a more likely driver of obfuscation. Our study emphasizes the importance of considering semantic language structures in understanding how media shapes perceptions, extending beyond coverage quantity and slant.
30209.zh_abstract: 本文研究了美国电视新闻中关于警察杀人案的报道语言模式。我们首先发现，与平民杀人案相比，媒体在报道警察杀人案时更频繁地使用模糊责任的语义结构——如被动语态、名词化和不及物动词。通过实地变异分析和一项在线实验，我们证明了这些语言差异确实会产生影响。在实地研究中，我们发现，那些恰好在观看更模糊的警察杀人案报道后参与调查的人，更倾向于支持增加警察经费。在我们的在线实验中，当参与者接触到模糊语言时，他们不太可能认为警察负有道德责任并要求惩罚，尤其是在受害者手无寸铁的情况下。回到新闻数据，我们发现当受害者手无寸铁、有视频片段可用或嫌疑人没有逃跑时——换句话说，在模糊化最为关键的情况下——模糊语言的使用率更高。关于这种差异化模糊化的成因，我们的证据既不符合需求侧驱动因素，也不符合与电视台所有权和政治倾向相关的供给侧因素。相反，我们的研究结果表明，由警察部门精心策划的原始叙述更可能是模糊化的驱动因素。我们的研究强调了在理解媒体如何塑造观念时，考虑语义语言结构的重要性，这超越了报道数量和倾向的范畴。
30209.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：K14, K42, L82

30208.title: Waivers for the Public Service Loan Forgiveness Program: Who Would Benefit from Takeup?
30208.zh_title: 公共服务贷款减免计划豁免：参与将惠及哪些人？
30208.authors: Diego A. Briones, Nathaniel Ruby, Sarah Turner
30208.abstract: For workers employed in the public and non-profit sectors, the Public Service Loan Forgiveness (PSLF) program offers the potential for full forgiveness of federal student loans for those with 10-years of full-time work experience. In practice, the benefits of the PSLF program have been illusory for many. In the first year of eligibility for forgiveness (2017), only 96 borrowers claimed benefits and even by the end of April of 2022 only 130,730 had received benefits. Administrative problems related to the certification of public service employment and the determination of qualifying loans led the Department of Education to issue temporary waivers (which expire in October of 2022) which essentially provide a path to forgiveness retroactively. In this paper, we explore the overall impact and distributional implications of potential full participation in loan forgiveness enabled by the PSLF waiver program using the 2018 Survey of Income and Program Participation (SIPP). Our estimates identify more than $\$100$ billion in loan forgiveness available to as many as 3.5 million borrowers through the PSLF waiver program. Potential beneficiaries of this initiative are disproportionately employed in occupations like teaching and health care. Full take-up of the PSLF waiver would lead to a narrowing of the racial gap in student debt burden. However, the distribution of potential benefits of the PSLF waiver depends critically on the extent to which those with high income or advanced degrees are differentially likely to take-up benefits conditional on eligibility.
30208.zh_abstract: 对于在公共和非营利部门工作的员工，公共服务贷款减免计划为拥有10年全职工作经验的人提供了全额免除联邦学生贷款的可能性。实际上，对许多人来说，PSLF计划的福利一直是虚幻的。在符合减免资格的第一年（2017年），只有96名借款人申请了福利，即使到2022年4月底，也只有130,730人获得了福利。与公共服务就业认证和合格贷款确定相关的行政问题导致教育部发布了临时豁免（于2022年10月到期），这些豁免实质上提供了一条追溯性的减免路径。在本文中，我们利用2018年收入与项目参与调查，探讨了通过PSLF豁免计划实现贷款减免的潜在全面参与的整体影响和分配含义。我们的估计显示，通过PSLF豁免计划，多达350万借款人可获得超过1000亿美元的贷款减免。该计划的潜在受益者不成比例地集中在教学和医疗保健等职业。全面参与PSLF豁免将缩小学生债务负担中的种族差距。然而，PSLF豁免潜在收益的分配关键取决于，在符合条件的情况下，高收入或高学历者是否更有可能参与并获益。

30207.title: Local Projections vs. VARs: Lessons From Thousands of DGPs
30207.zh_title: 局部投影法与向量自回归模型：来自数千个数据生成过程的经验教训
30207.authors: Dake Li, Mikkel Plagborg-Møller, Christian K. Wolf
30207.abstract: We conduct a simulation study of Local Projection (LP) and Vector Autoregression (VAR) estimators of structural impulse responses across thousands of data generating processes, designed to mimic the properties of the universe of U.S. macroeconomic data. Our analysis considers various identification schemes and several variants of LP and VAR estimators. A clear bias-variance trade-off emerges: LP estimators have lower bias than VAR estimators but substantially higher variance at intermediate and long horizons. Consequently, unless researchers are overwhelmingly concerned with bias, shrinkage via Bayesian VARs or penalized LPs is attractive.
30207.zh_abstract: 我们针对数千个旨在模仿美国宏观经济数据整体特性的数据生成过程，对结构脉冲响应的局部投影法和向量自回归模型估计量进行了模拟研究。我们的分析考虑了各种识别方案以及LP和VAR估计量的几种变体。一个清晰的偏差-方差权衡出现了：LP估计量比VAR估计量具有更低的偏差，但在中期和长期具有显著更高的方差。因此，除非研究者极其关注偏差问题，否则通过贝叶斯VAR或惩罚LP进行收缩是很有吸引力的。

30206.title: How Did Federal Aid to States and Localities Affect Testing and Vaccine Delivery?
30206.zh_title: 联邦对州和地方政府的援助如何影响检测和疫苗交付？
30206.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Philip G. Hoxie, John Kearns, Stan Veuger
30206.abstract: We estimate whether federal aid for state and local governments played a role in advancing population testing for COVID-19 and the administration of vaccines. To overcome biases that can result from the endogeneity of federal aid allocations, we use an instrumental-variables estimator reliant on the substantial variation in federal aid predicted by variation in states’ congressional representation. We find that federal fiscal assistance dollars had a modest if any impact on the pace of vaccine rollouts, may have improved the equitability of vaccine administration, and had a substantial impact on the volume of tests administered. Regarding the total number of vaccines delivered, we estimate that an additional $\$1,000$ in fiscal relief per resident, which would amount to $\$330$ billion nationwide, translated into just under 1,200 extra doses of the vaccine being delivered per 100,000 people, with the upper bound of our confidence interval suggesting that we can rule out effects in excess of 7,030 extra doses per 100,000 people. We find that federal dollars predict a smaller gap between the vaccination rates of those with a college education relative to those with a high school education. Finally, our baseline estimate implies that each $\$1,000$ in COVID-19 relief aid per capita generated 55,850 additional tests per 100,000 people.
30206.zh_abstract: 我们估算了联邦对州和地方政府的援助是否在推进COVID-19人群检测和疫苗管理方面发挥了作用。为了克服因联邦援助分配内生性可能导致的偏差，我们使用了一个工具变量估计量，该估计量依赖于由各州国会代表权差异所预测的联邦援助的巨大变化。我们发现，联邦财政援助资金对疫苗推广速度的影响即使有也是微乎其微，可能改善了疫苗管理的公平性，并对检测数量产生了实质性影响。关于疫苗交付总量，我们估计，每位居民额外获得1000美元的财政救济（全国范围内总计3300亿美元），仅相当于每10万人中多交付不到1200剂疫苗，而我们置信区间的上限表明，可以排除每10万人中超过7030剂额外疫苗的影响。我们发现，联邦资金预示着大学学历者与高中学历者之间疫苗接种率的差距会缩小。最后，我们的基准估计表明，人均每1000美元的COVID-19救济援助，每10万人中就会增加55,850次检测。

30205.title: The Quality of Financial Advice: What Influences Client Recommendations?
30205.zh_title: 财务建议的质量：什么影响了客户推荐？
30205.authors: Philippe d'Astous, Irina Gemmo, Pierre-Carl Michaud
30205.abstract: In this paper, we conduct an experiment with a large sample of financial planner professionals in Canada to elicit factors which may influence client recommendations. Using repeated client vignettes, we find that recommendations are often in-line with what one would expect from economic theory. In particular, advice is sensitive in expected ways to relative costs and benefits of particular options. In some domains, we find evidence that planners are more likely to recommend products they own themselves, their spouse owns, or they are licensed to sell. In the investment domain, we also find that planners are more likely to recommend products that clients inquire about even when this type of solicitation is randomized across clients and options. Finally, we find that planners are systematically sensitive to the gender of the client even when gender is uninformative regarding which recommendation to make.
30205.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们与加拿大大量理财规划师专业人士进行了一项实验，以探究可能影响客户推荐的因素。通过使用重复的客户情景案例，我们发现推荐通常符合经济理论的预期。特别是，建议对特定选项的相对成本和收益的敏感方式符合预期。在某些领域，我们发现证据表明，规划师更有可能推荐自己、其配偶拥有或他们获准销售的产品。在投资领域，我们还发现，即使这种询问在客户和选项之间是随机分配的，规划师也更有可能推荐客户询问过的产品。最后，我们发现规划师系统性地对客户的性别敏感，即使性别对于应做出何种推荐并无信息价值。

30204.title: Persecution and Migrant Self-Selection: Evidence from the Collapse of the Communist Bloc
30204.zh_title: 迫害与移民自我选择：来自共产主义集团崩溃的证据
30204.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Travis Baseler, Isabelle Sin
30204.abstract: How does persecution affect who migrates? We analyze migrants’ self-selection out of the USSR and its satellite states before and after the collapse of Communism using census microdata from the three largest destination countries: Germany, Israel, and the United States. We find that migrants arriving before and around the time of the collapse (who were more likely to have moved because of persecution) were more educated and had better labor market outcomes in the destination than those arriving later. This change is not fully explained by the removal of emigration restrictions in the Communist Bloc. Instead, we show that this pattern is consistent with more positive self-selection of migrants who are motivated by persecution. When the highly educated disproportionately forgo migrating to enjoy the amenities of their home country, persecution can induce them to leave.
30204.zh_abstract: 迫害如何影响谁选择移民？我们利用来自三个最大目的地国——德国、以色列和美国的人口普查微观数据，分析了共产主义崩溃前后来自苏联及其卫星国的移民的自我选择。我们发现，在崩溃前后抵达的移民（更可能是因迫害而迁移）比后来抵达的移民受教育程度更高，在目的地国的劳动力市场表现更好。这种变化并不能完全用共产主义集团移民限制的取消来解释。相反，我们表明，这种模式与受迫害动机驱动的移民更积极的自我选择是一致的。当高学历者不成比例地放弃移民以享受母国的便利设施时，迫害可以促使他们离开。
30204.meta: Programs：DAE, LS；JEL：F22, J6, N30, N32, N34

30203.title: Shareholder Power and the Decline of Labor
30203.zh_title: 股东权力与劳动力衰落
30203.authors: Antonio Falato, Hyunseob Kim, Till M. von Wachter
30203.abstract: Shareholder power in the US grew over recent decades due to a steep rise in concentrated institutional ownership. Using establishment-level data from the US Census Bureau’s Longitudinal Business Database for 1982-2015, this paper examines the impact of increases in concentrated institutional ownership on employment, wages, shareholder returns, and labor productivity. Consistent with theory of the firm based on conflicts of interests between shareholders and stakeholders, we find that establishments of firms that experience an increase in ownership by larger and more concentrated institutional shareholders have lower employment and wages. This result holds in both panel regressions with establishment fixed effects and a difference-in-differences design that exploits large increases in concentrated institutional ownership, and is robust to controls for industry and local shocks. The result is more pronounced in industries where labor is relatively less unionized, in more monopsonistic local labor markets, and for dedicated and activist institutional shareholders. The labor losses are accompanied by higher shareholder returns but no improvements in labor productivity, suggesting that shareholder power mainly reallocates rents away from workers. Our results imply that the rise in concentrated institutional ownership could explain about a quarter of the secular decline in the aggregate labor share.
30203.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，由于集中机构持股的急剧增加，美国股东权力有所增长。本文利用美国人口普查局纵向企业数据库1982-2015年的企业层面数据，考察了集中机构持股增加对就业、工资、股东回报和劳动生产率的影响。与基于股东与利益相关者利益冲突的企业理论一致，我们发现，那些经历更大、更集中的机构股东持股增加的企业，其企业的就业和工资水平较低。这一结果在包含企业固定效应的面板回归以及利用集中机构持股大幅增加的倍差法设计中均成立，并且对行业和本地冲击的控制是稳健的。这一结果在工会化程度相对较低的行业、更具买方垄断性的本地劳动力市场以及针对专注型和积极型机构股东时更为显著。劳动力损失伴随着更高的股东回报，但劳动生产率没有改善，这表明股东权力主要将租金从工人手中重新分配。我们的结果表明，集中机构持股的兴起可以解释总劳动份额长期下降的大约四分之一。

30202.title: Economic vs. Epidemiological Approaches to Measuring the Human Capital Impacts of Infectious Disease Elimination
30202.zh_title: 衡量消除传染病的人力资本影响：经济学方法与流行病学方法
30202.authors: Caroline Chuard, Hannes Schwandt, Alexander D. Becker, Masahiko Haraguchi
30202.abstract: A rich economic literature has examined the human capital impacts of disease-eliminating health interventions, such as the rollout of new vaccines. This literature is based on reduced-form approaches which exploit proxies for disease burden, such as mortality, instead of actual infection counts, which are difficult to measure. We develop an epidemiological dynamic accounting model based on the susceptible-infected-recovered (SIR) framework to derive precise measles infection shares across U.S. cohorts born around the introduction of the measles vaccine. Measles is highly infectious and fully immunizing which makes the disease an ideal candidate for epidemiological modeling. Our epidemiological model is strongly predictive of future measles outbreaks but the derived measles infection shares are not systematically related to cohorts' later educational, economic, or health outcomes. The reduced-form approach, on the other hand, shows that these long-term outcomes strongly improved among vaccinated cohorts in states with high pre-vaccine measles mortality. Our results suggest that differences in disease severity are more relevant for long-term human capital impacts than raw differences in actual infection rates, supporting the reduced-form approach used in the economic literature.
30202.zh_abstract: 丰富的经济学文献研究了消除疾病的健康干预措施（如新疫苗的推广）对人力资本的影响。这类文献基于简化形式方法，利用死亡率等疾病负担的代理变量，而非难以衡量的实际感染人数。我们基于易感-感染-恢复框架开发了一个流行病学动态核算模型，以精确推导出在麻疹疫苗引入前后出生的美国各队列中麻疹感染的比例。麻疹具有高度传染性且能产生完全免疫，这使得该疾病成为流行病学建模的理想候选。我们的流行病学模型对未来麻疹爆发具有很强的预测能力，但推导出的麻疹感染比例与队列后来的教育、经济或健康结果并无系统关联。另一方面，简化形式方法表明，在疫苗前时代麻疹死亡率高的州，接种疫苗的队列的这些长期结果得到了显著改善。我们的结果表明，疾病严重程度的差异对长期人力资本的影响比实际感染率的原始差异更为重要，这支持了经济学文献中使用的简化形式方法。

30201.title: Effects of Restrictive Abortion Legislation on Cohort Mortality Evidence from 19th Century Law Variation
30201.zh_title: 限制性堕胎立法对队列死亡率的影响：来自19世纪法律变异的证据
30201.authors: Joanna N. Lahey, Marianne H. Wanamaker
30201.abstract: Recent studies based on 20th century US data conclude that abortion access raises children’s average socioeconomic outcomes. We generalize a model of fertility, highlighting assumptions under which these abortion predictions can be reversed. Using 19th century abortion restrictions, we empirically demonstrate these points. Despite a more than 5 percent increase in birth rates among abortion-restricted cohorts, we find little evidence of negative selection at birth. Longevity was affected nevertheless; in the first ten years of life, children in these larger cohorts died of infectious disease more frequently. These mortality effects diminish with age, potentially reversing at older ages as a result of disease immunity or other offsetting factors.
30201.zh_abstract: 基于20世纪美国数据的最新研究得出结论，堕胎可及性提高了儿童的平均社会经济成果。我们概括了一个生育模型，强调了这些堕胎预测可能被逆转的假设条件。利用19世纪的堕胎限制，我们实证证明了这些观点。尽管受堕胎限制的队列中出生率增加了超过5%，但我们几乎没有发现出生时负向选择的证据。然而，寿命仍然受到影响；在生命的前十年，这些较大队列中的儿童更频繁地死于传染病。这些死亡率效应随年龄增长而减弱，并可能因疾病免疫或其他抵消因素而在老年时逆转。
30201.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, EH, LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：H75, J1, J13, J16, J18, K14, K15, K38, N3, N31, N4, N41

30200.title: Dependent Coverage and Parental "Job Lock": Evidence from the Affordable Care Act
30200.zh_title: 受抚养人保险覆盖与父母的“工作锁定”：来自《平价医疗法案》的证据
30200.authors: Hannah Bae, Katherine Meckel, Maggie Shi
30200.abstract: Coverage for dependents is a standard feature of employer-sponsored insurance. While prior work shows that employees trade off job mobility for their own coverage, less is known about the intra-family spillovers of dependent coverage on parental labor supply. We study this question using a large panel of employer-based insurance claims that links dependent enrollment to a proxy for parental job retention. We use a regression discontinuity design that exploits a sharp change in the duration of dependent eligibility by birth month under the Affordable Care Act. We find that additional dependent insurance eligibility increases both dependent take-up and parental job retention. This “job lock” effect is strongest among parents more likely to be on the margin of a job exit, for families that place higher value on dependent coverage, and employees of firms offering a broader range of insurance options.
30200.zh_abstract: 受抚养人保险覆盖是雇主提供保险的一个标准特征。虽然先前的研究表明，员工为了自身的保险覆盖而牺牲工作流动性，但关于受抚养人保险覆盖对父母劳动力供给的家庭内部溢出效应知之甚少。我们利用一个大型雇主保险索赔面板数据来研究这个问题，该数据将受抚养人注册与父母工作保留的代理变量联系起来。我们采用断点回归设计，利用《平价医疗法案》下按出生月份划分的受抚养人资格期限的急剧变化。我们发现，额外的受抚养人保险资格同时增加了受抚养人的参保率和父母的工作保留。这种“工作锁定”效应在更可能处于离职边缘的父母、更重视受抚养人保险覆盖的家庭以及提供更广泛保险选择范围的公司的员工中最为强烈。
30200.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, PE；JEL：H0, I13, I28

30240.title: Global Supply Chain Pressures, International Trade, and Inflation
30240.zh_title: 全球供应链压力、国际贸易与通货膨胀
30240.authors: Julian di Giovanni, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Alvaro Silva, Muhammed A. Yildirim
30240.abstract: We study the impact of the Covid-19 pandemic on Euro Area inflation and how it compares to the experiences of other countries, such as the United States, over the two-year period 2020-21. Our model-based calibration exercises deliver four key results: 1) Compositional effects – the switch from services to goods consumption – are amplified through global input-output linkages, affecting both trade and inflation. 2) Inflation can be higher under sector-specific labor shortages relative to a scenario with no such supply shocks. 3) Foreign shocks and global supply chain bottlenecks played an outsized role relative to domestic aggregate demand shocks in explaining Euro Area inflation over 2020-21. 4) International trade did not respond to changes in GDP as strongly as it did during the 2008-09 crisis despite strong demand for goods. These lower trade elasticities in part reflect supply chain bottlenecks. These four results imply that policies aimed at stimulating aggregate demand would not have produced as high an inflation as the one observed in the data without the negative sectoral supply shocks.
30240.zh_abstract: 我们研究了新冠疫情对欧元区通胀的影响，并将其与2020-21两年期间美国等其他国家的经历进行了比较。基于模型的校准分析得出了四个关键结果：1) 结构性效应——从服务消费转向商品消费——通过全球投入产出联系被放大，同时影响了贸易和通胀。2) 与没有此类供给冲击的情景相比，特定行业的劳动力短缺可能导致更高的通胀。3) 在解释2020-21年欧元区通胀方面，外国冲击和全球供应链瓶颈相对于国内总需求冲击发挥了更大的作用。4) 尽管对商品的需求强劲，但国际贸易对国内生产总值变化的反应不如2008-09年危机期间那样强烈。这些较低的贸易弹性部分反映了供应链瓶颈。这四个结果意味着，如果没有负面的行业供给冲击，旨在刺激总需求的政策不会产生数据中观察到的那么高的通胀。

30239.title: Minimum Wages and Labor Markets in the Twin Cities
30239.zh_title: 双城的最低工资与劳动力市场
30239.authors: Loukas Karabarbounis, Jeremy Lise, Anusha Nath
30239.abstract: We present new evidence on the labor market effects of large and permanent minimum wage increases by examining the policy changes implemented by Minneapolis and announced by Saint Paul in 2018. Beginning with synthetic difference-in-differences methods, we find that the increase in the minimum wage substantially decreased employment in restaurants, retail, and health, even after accounting for potential confounding effects from the pandemic and civil unrest. Next, using variation in exposure to the minimum wage across establishments and workers within zip codes and industries of the Twin Cities, we find employment effects that are about half as large as those from the time series. We quantify an industry equilibrium model to rationalize our estimates and differentiate among competing economic mechanisms that determine how the minimum wage affects the labor market. Our model accounts quantitatively for the importance of reduced entry in generating a larger employment decline than implied by the cross-sectional estimates; for the employment decline from the announcement of a future minimum wage increase; and for the more negative employment effects of the minimum wage over time, relative to the size of the increase, and when the economy is in a recession.
30239.zh_abstract: 我们通过考察明尼阿波利斯市实施以及圣保罗市于2018年宣布的政策变化，提供了关于大规模、永久性最低工资上涨对劳动力市场影响的新证据。首先使用合成双重差分法，我们发现，即使在考虑了疫情和社会动荡的潜在混杂效应后，最低工资的提高也显著减少了餐饮、零售和医疗行业的就业。接下来，利用双城邮政编码和行业内各企业及工人对最低工资暴露程度的差异，我们发现的就业效应大约是时间序列估计结果的一半。我们量化了一个行业均衡模型，以合理化我们的估计，并区分决定最低工资如何影响劳动力市场的相互竞争的经济机制。我们的模型在数量上解释了：相对于横截面估计所暗示的就业下降，进入减少在产生更大就业下降中的重要性；未来最低工资上涨公告导致的就业下降；以及随着时间的推移、相对于涨幅而言以及当经济处于衰退时，最低工资带来的更负面的就业效应。

30238.title: Will the Developing World’s Growing Middle Class Support Low Carbon Policies?
30238.zh_title: 发展中国家日益壮大的中产阶级会支持低碳政策吗？
30238.abstract: As billions of people in the developing world seek to increase their living standards, their aspirations pose a challenge to global efforts to cut greenhouse gas emissions. The emerging middle class are buying and operating energy intensive durables ranging from vehicles to air conditioners to computers. Owners of these durables represent an interest group with a stake in opposing carbon pricing. The political economy of encouraging middle class support for carbon pricing hinges on offsetting its perceived negative income effects. Rising environmentalism in the developing world could also increase support for credible GHG reduction policy. We quantify these effects as we estimate Engel curves of durables ownership, compare the grid’s carbon intensity by nation and study the demographic correlates of support for prioritizing environmental protection.
30238.zh_abstract: 随着发展中国家数十亿人寻求提高生活水平，他们的愿望对全球减少温室气体排放的努力构成了挑战。新兴中产阶级正在购买和使用从汽车到空调再到电脑等高耗能耐用品。这些耐用品的所有者代表了一个利益集团，他们有理由反对碳定价。鼓励中产阶级支持碳定价的政治经济学关键在于抵消其感知到的负面收入效应。发展中国家日益增长的环保主义也可能增加对可信的温室气体减排政策的支持。我们在估计耐用品所有权的恩格尔曲线、比较各国电网的碳强度以及研究支持优先保护环境的人口统计学相关因素时，量化了这些效应。
30238.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, PE, POL；JEL：H23, H87, Q54

30237.title: Intergenerational Transmission of Health at Birth: Fathers Matter Too!
30237.zh_title: 出生健康水平的代际传递：父亲也很重要！
30237.authors: Osea Giuntella, Giulia La Mattina, Climent Quintana-Domeque
30237.abstract: We use a unique data set of linked birth records from Florida to analyze the intergenerational transmission of health at birth by parental gender. We show that both paternal and maternal birth weights signiﬁcantly predict the child’s birth weight, even after accounting for all genetic and environmental factors that are common and time-invariant within a family. Our estimates reveal that a one standard deviation increase in mother’s birth weight (535 grams) translates into a 0.13-0.24 standard deviations increase in child’s birth weight (70-128 grams), accounting or not for maternal grandmother ﬁxed eﬀects. On the father’s side, we ﬁnd that a one standard deviation increase in father’s birth weight (563 grams) translates into a 0.10-0.15 standard deviations increase in child’s birth weight (56-78 grams), accounting or not for paternal grandmother ﬁxed eﬀects. The signiﬁcant role of both maternal and paternal health at birth in explaining oﬀspring health at birth is conﬁrmed when using alternative metrics: intrauterine growth, being small for gestational age or being too heavy (i.e., macrosomic).
30237.zh_abstract: 我们利用佛罗里达州关联出生记录的独特数据集，按父母性别分析了出生健康水平的代际传递。我们表明，即使在考虑了家庭内部所有共同且随时间不变的遗传和环境因素后，父亲和母亲的出生体重都能显著预测孩子的出生体重。我们的估计显示，母亲出生体重每增加一个标准差（535克），孩子的出生体重就会增加0.13-0.24个标准差（70-128克），无论是否考虑外祖母的固定效应。在父亲方面，我们发现父亲出生体重每增加一个标准差（563克），孩子的出生体重就会增加0.10-0.15个标准差（56-78克），无论是否考虑祖母的固定效应。当使用替代指标时，母亲和父亲出生健康水平在解释后代出生健康方面的显著作用得到了证实：这些指标包括宫内生长情况、小于胎龄儿或体重过重（即巨大儿）。

30236.title: When Is Discrimination Unfair?
30236.authors: Peter J. Kuhn, Trevor T. Osaki
30236.abstract: Using a vignette-based survey experiment on Amazon’s Mechanical Turk, we measure how people’s assessments of the fairness of race-based hiring decisions vary with the motivation and circumstances surrounding the discriminatory act and the races of the parties involved. Regardless of their political leaning, our subjects react in very similar ways to the employer’s motivations for the action, such as the quality of information on which statistical discrimination is based. Compared to conservatives, moderates and liberals are much less accepting of discriminatory actions, and consider the discriminatee’s race when making their fairness assessments. We describe four pre-registered models of fairness – (simple) utilitarianism, race-blind rules (RBRs), racial in-group bias, and belief-based utilitarianism (BBU) – and show that the latter two are inconsistent with major aggregate patterns in our data. Instead, we argue that a two-group framework, in which one group (mostly self-described conservatives) values employers’ decision rights and the remaining respondents value utilitarian concerns, explains our main findings well. In this model, both groups also value applying a consistent set of fairness rules in a race-blind manner.
30236.zh_abstract: 通过在亚马逊土耳其机器人平台上进行的一项基于情景的调查实验，我们衡量了人们对基于种族的招聘决策公平性的评估如何随着歧视行为的动机和情境以及所涉种族的种族而变化。无论其政治倾向如何，我们的受试者对雇主行为动机（例如统计歧视所依据的信息质量）的反应方式非常相似。与保守派相比，温和派和自由派更不接受歧视性行为，并且在做出公平性评估时会考虑被歧视者的种族。我们描述了四个预先注册的公平模型——（简单）功利主义、种族盲规则、种族内群体偏好和基于信念的功利主义——并表明后两者与我们数据中的主要总体模式不一致。相反，我们认为一个双群体框架可以很好地解释我们的主要发现，在该框架中，一个群体（主要是自认为是保守派的人）重视雇主的决策权，而其余受访者则重视功利主义关切。在这个模型中，两个群体也都重视以种族盲目的方式应用一套一致的公平规则。

30235.title: Data and Welfare in Credit Markets
30235.zh_title: 信贷市场中的数据与福利
30235.authors: Mark Jansen, Fabian Nagel, Constantine Yannelis, Anthony Lee Zhang
30235.abstract: We show how to measure the welfare effects arising from increased data availability. When lenders have more data on prospective borrower costs, they can charge prices that are more aligned with these costs. This increases total social welfare and transfers surplus from borrowers to lenders. We show that the magnitudes of the welfare changes can be estimated using only quantity data and variation in prices. We apply the methodology on bankruptcy flag removals and find that removing prior bankruptcy information substantially increases the social surplus of previously bankrupt consumers, at the cost of a modest decrease in total social welfare. This suggests that flag removals have low efficiency costs for redistributing surplus to previously bankrupt borrowers. We show how the framework can be extended to incorporate adverse selection and imperfect competition.
30235.zh_abstract: 我们展示了如何衡量数据可用性增加带来的福利效应。当贷款人拥有更多关于潜在借款人成本的数据时，他们可以设定与这些成本更一致的定价。这增加了总社会福利，并将剩余从借款人转移给贷款人。我们表明，福利变化的幅度可以仅使用数量数据和价格变化来估计。我们将该方法应用于破产标记移除，并发现移除先前的破产信息显著增加了先前破产消费者的社会剩余，但代价是总社会福利的适度下降。这表明，标记移除在将剩余重新分配给先前破产借款人方面具有较低效率成本。我们展示了如何将该框架扩展到包含逆向选择和不完全竞争。
30235.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, LE, PE, PR；JEL：D6, G20, G21, G28, G5, H81

30234.title: Common Fund Flows: Flow Hedging and Factor Pricing
30234.zh_title: 共同基金流量：流量对冲与因子定价
30234.authors: Leonid Kogan, Winston Wei Dou, Wei Wu
30234.abstract: Active equity funds care about fund size, affected by fund flows that obey a strong factor structure with the common component responding to macroeconomic shocks. Funds hedge against common flows by tilting their portfolios toward low-flow-beta stocks, while household/retail and index investors overweight high-flow-beta stocks in equilibrium. Consequently, common flows earn a risk premium, leading to a multi-factor asset-pricing model resembling the ICAPM, even with myopic agents and unsophisticated fund clients. Exploiting quasi-experiments induced by the local-natural-disaster occurrences and the unexpected trade-war announcements, we find that an increased outflow risk faced by funds leads to more aggressive flow-hedging portfolio tilts.
30234.zh_abstract: 主动型股票基金关注基金规模，而基金规模受基金流量影响，这些流量遵循强因子结构，其共同成分对宏观经济冲击做出反应。基金通过将投资组合向低流量贝塔股票倾斜来对冲共同流量，而家庭/散户和指数投资者在均衡中则超配高流量贝塔股票。因此，共同流量获得风险溢价，导致一个类似于跨期资本资产定价模型的多因子资产定价模型，即使存在短视的代理人和不成熟的基金客户也是如此。利用由局部自然灾害发生和意外贸易战公告引发的准实验，我们发现基金面临的流出风险增加会导致更激进的对冲流量投资组合倾斜。

30233.title: Combating Cross-Border Externalities
30233.authors: Shiyi Chen, Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Huanhuan Wang, Jiaxin Xiong
30233.abstract: This paper investigates the impact of a pioneering pollution reduction program, the Ecological Compensation Initiative (ECI) in China, which establishes side payments between upstream and downstream provinces along the same river. The program includes both Coasian and pay-for-performance elements. Instructed by a theoretical model, we employ a difference-in-differences empirical design and find strong evidence that the ECI mitigates the spillover effect of water pollution at the province boundary and brings about sharp reductions in water pollutant emissions from upstream firms, especially those in heavily polluting industries. This initiative also reduces upstream firms’ output and pollution intensity relative to downstream firms. The impact is stronger for upstream firms closer to the river and the point at which it enters the downstream province. Further evidence shows a significant increase in the rate of firms’ entry into neighboring prefectures, but no impact on firms’ exit from that region due to the initiative. Evidence from similar programs, later established in other river systems, suggests that cross-jurisdictional negotiations can effectively mitigate cross-border pollution externalities.
30233.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一项开创性的污染减排计划——中国的生态补偿倡议的影响，该计划在同一条河流的上游和下游省份之间建立了横向转移支付。该计划既包含科斯式要素，也包含按绩效付费要素。在理论模型的指导下，我们采用双重差分实证设计，发现了强有力的证据表明生态补偿倡议减轻了省界处水污染的溢出效应，并导致上游企业（尤其是重污染行业的企业）的水污染物排放大幅减少。该倡议还降低了上游企业相对于下游企业的产出和污染强度。对于更靠近河流以及河流进入下游省份点的上游企业，其影响更强。进一步证据显示，该倡议显著提高了企业进入邻近地级市的比率，但对企业的退出没有影响。来自后来在其他河流系统建立的类似项目的证据表明，跨辖区谈判可以有效缓解跨境污染外部性。
30233.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EH, PE；JEL：D22, H7, K32, Q53, Q56

30232.title: Attrition from Administrative Data: Problems and Solutions with an Application to Postsecondary Education
30232.zh_title: 行政数据中的样本流失：问题与解决方案——以高等教育为例
30232.abstract: This paper examines the bias arising from individuals’ migration from administrative outcome data, with a focus on the labor market consequences of postsecondary education. We find that out-of-state migration is particularly problematic for high-earners, flagship graduates, and certain majors. Consequently, the effect of graduating from a flagship university is 10% higher than one would estimate using in-state earnings exclusively, though the extent of bias differs substantially across contexts. The impact of obtaining a 2-year CTE credential is also understated, as are earnings differences across majors. Approaches to testing for and bounding this bias are considered.
30232.zh_abstract: 本文考察了因个体从行政结果数据中迁移而产生的偏差，重点关注高等教育的劳动力市场后果。我们发现，跨州迁移对于高收入者、旗舰大学毕业生以及某些专业尤其成问题。因此，从旗舰大学毕业的影响比仅使用州内收入估计的结果高出10%，尽管偏差程度在不同情境下差异很大。获得两年制职业技术教育证书的影响也被低估，不同专业之间的收入差异同样如此。本文考虑了检验和界定这种偏差的方法。

30231.title: The Value of Pharmacy Benefit Management
30231.abstract: In theory, equilibrium profits for drug patent holders would not involve significant restraints on production and patient utilization if the market had a mechanism for two-part pricing (Oi 1971) or quantity commitments (Murphy, Snyder, and Topel 2014). In fact, patent expiration has little effect on drug utilization especially when those drugs are delivered through insurance plans. This paper provides a quantitative model consistent with the theory and evidence in which pharmacy benefit management on behalf of insurance plans serves these and other purposes in both monopoly and oligopoly provider settings. Calibrating the model to the U.S. market, I conclude that pharmacy benefit management is worth at least $\$145$ billion annually beyond its resource costs. PBM services add at least $\$192$ billion annually in value to society compared to a manufacturer price-control regime. Requiring all PBM services to be self-provided by plan sponsors would forgo about 40 percent of the net value of PBM services largely by increasing management costs. Due to changes in the incidence of PBM services over the drug life cycle, the services encourage innovation even though they reduce the profits of incumbent manufacturers.
30231.zh_abstract: 理论上，如果市场存在两部定价机制或数量承诺机制，药品专利持有者的均衡利润不会对生产和患者使用施加显著限制。事实上，专利到期对药品使用影响甚微，尤其是当这些药品通过保险计划提供时。本文提供了一个与理论和证据一致的定量模型，在该模型中，代表保险计划进行的药品福利管理在垄断和寡头供应商环境中均能实现这些及其他目的。通过将模型校准到美国市场，我得出结论：药品福利管理每年至少价值1450亿美元（超出其资源成本）。与制造商价格管制制度相比，药品福利管理服务每年为社会增加至少1920亿美元的价值。要求所有药品福利管理服务由计划发起人自行提供，将损失约40%的药品福利管理服务净价值，这主要是由于管理成本增加。由于药品福利管理服务在药品生命周期中的发生率发生变化，这些服务虽然降低了现有制造商的利润，但鼓励了创新。
30231.meta: Programs：EH, IO, LE；JEL：D43, D71, I11, I13, L14

30230.title: Acquisitions, Management, and Efficiency in Rwanda's Coffee Industry
30230.zh_title: 卢旺达咖啡行业的收购、管理与效率
30230.abstract: Well-functioning markets allocate assets to owners that improve firms’ management and performance. We study the effects of ownership changes on coffee mills in Rwanda – an industry in which managing relationships with farmers and seasonal workers is important and that has seen many ownership changes in recent years. We combine administrative data, a survey panel of mills and an original survey of acquirers that allows us to construct acquirer-specific and target-specific control groups. A difference-in-differences design reveals that ownership changes do not improve performance unless the mill is acquired by a foreign firm. Our preferred interpretation – supported by detailed survey evidence that considers alternative hypotheses – is that foreign firms successfully implement management changes in key operational areas. Upon acquisition, both domestic and foreign owned mills attempt to implement similar changes, but domestic firms face resistance from workers and farmers. Domestic owners have relationships with their local communities, which can create opportunities to establish new mills and acquire existing ones. However, these same relationships create pressure to maintain status-quo relational arrangements, which makes it harder to implement managerial changes.
30230.zh_abstract: 运作良好的市场将资产分配给能够改善企业管理和绩效的所有者。我们研究了所有权变更对卢旺达咖啡加工厂的影响——在这个行业中，管理与农民和季节性工人的关系至关重要，并且近年来经历了多次所有权变更。我们结合了行政数据、加工厂调查面板数据以及对收购方的原始调查数据，从而能够构建收购方特定和目标特定的对照组。双重差分设计显示，除非加工厂被外国公司收购，否则所有权变更不会改善绩效。我们偏好的解释——得到了考虑替代假设的详细调查证据的支持——是外国公司在关键运营领域成功实施了管理变革。在收购后，国内和外资所有的加工厂都试图实施类似的变革，但国内公司面临来自工人和农民的阻力。国内所有者与其当地社区存在关系，这可以创造建立新加工厂和收购现有加工厂的机会。然而，这些相同的关系造成了维持现状关系安排的压力，这使得实施管理变革更加困难。
30230.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, ITI, PR；JEL：D24, G32, G34, L25, N57, O12, O16

30229.title: Real-Time Inequality
30229.authors: Thomas Blanchet, Léon Mouillet, Emmanuel Saez, Gabriel Zucman
30229.abstract: This paper constructs high-frequency and timely income distributions for the United States. We develop a methodology to combine the information contained in high-frequency public data sources—including monthly household and employment surveys, quarterly censuses of employment and wages, and monthly and quarterly national accounts statistics—in a unified framework. This allows us to estimate economic growth by income groups, race, and gender consistent with quarterly releases of macroeconomic growth, and to track the distributional impacts of government policies during and in the aftermath of recessions in real time. We test and successfully validate our methodology by implementing it retrospectively back to 1976. Analyzing the Covid-19 pandemic, we find that all income groups recovered their pre-crisis pretax income level within 20 months of the beginning of the recession. Although the recovery was primarily driven by jobs rather than wage growth, real wages experienced significant gains at the bottom of the distribution in 2021 and 2022, highlighting the equalizing effects of tight labor markets. After accounting for taxes and cash transfers, real disposable income for the bottom 50% was nearly 20% higher in 2021 than in 2019, but fell in 2022 as the expansion of the welfare state during the pandemic was rolled back. All estimates are available at https://realtimeinequality.org and are updated with each quarterly release of the national accounts, within a few hours.
30229.zh_abstract: 本文构建了美国的高频且及时的收入分配数据。我们开发了一种方法，将高频公共数据源（包括月度家庭和就业调查、季度就业和工资普查以及月度与季度国民账户统计）中的信息整合到一个统一框架中。这使我们能够估算按收入群体、种族和性别划分的经济增长，并与季度宏观经济增长数据保持一致，并实时追踪经济衰退期间及之后政府政策的分配效应。我们通过将方法回溯至1976年进行实施来测试并成功验证了该方法。分析新冠疫情，我们发现所有收入群体在衰退开始后的20个月内恢复了危机前的税前收入水平。尽管复苏主要由就业而非工资增长驱动，但2021年和2022年收入分配底层的实际工资显著增长，凸显了紧张劳动力市场的均等化效应。在考虑税收和现金转移后，2021年底层50%人口的实际可支配收入比2019年高出近20%，但随着疫情期间福利国家扩张的逆转，2022年该收入有所下降。所有估计值均可访问https://realtimeinequality.org，并在每次国民账户季度发布后的几小时内更新。
30229.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：E01, H2, H5, J3

30227.title: STEM Summer Programs for Underrepresented Youth Increase STEM Degrees
30227.zh_title: 面向弱势青年的STEM暑期项目增加STEM学位获得
30227.authors: Sarah R. Cohodes, Helen Ho, Silvia C. Robles
30227.abstract: Underrepresentation of Black and Hispanic workers in STEM fields contributes to racial wage gaps and reduces innovation and economic growth. “Pipeline” programs intended to increase diversity are a common intervention to address these problems, but there is little rigorous evidence of their efficacy. We fielded a randomized controlled trial to study a suite of such programs targeted to underrepresented high-school students and hosted at an elite technical institution. Students offered seats in the STEM summer programs were more likely to enroll in, persist through, and graduate from elite colleges and to graduate with a degree in a STEM field. These improvements in college outcomes raised predicted earnings by 3 to 15 percentage points. Increased knowledge of the college application process and a more ambitious college application strategy appear to be a key mechanism.
30227.zh_abstract: 黑人和西班牙裔工人在STEM领域的代表性不足加剧了种族工资差距，并降低了创新和经济增长。旨在增加多样性的“管道”项目是解决这些问题的常见干预措施，但关于其有效性的严格证据很少。我们进行了一项随机对照试验，研究一套针对弱势高中生的此类项目，这些项目由一所精英技术机构主办。获得STEM暑期项目名额的学生更有可能进入、坚持并毕业于精英大学，并以STEM领域学位毕业。这些大学成果的改善将预测收入提高了3到15个百分点。对大学申请过程了解的增强和更雄心勃勃的大学申请策略似乎是一个关键机制。
30227.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PR；JEL：I21, I24, J15, J16

30226.title: Restoring Confidence in Troubled Financial Institutions After a Financial Crisis
30226.zh_title: 金融危机后恢复对陷入困境金融机构的信心
30226.abstract: After an unprecedented number of banks suspended operations during the Panic of 1893, the head regulator of banks chartered by the United States government allowed about 100 banks to reopen after certifying their solvency. We evaluate whether actions by bank owners to change management, contract with depositors to extend liability maturity structure, write off bad assets, and/or inject capital affected bank survival and deposit retention. This historical episode is particularly informative because there was no expectation of government intervention. We find that contracting with depositors provided short-term benefits while dealing with bad assets was key for long-run viability.
30226.zh_abstract: 在1893年恐慌期间，空前数量的银行暂停营业后，由美国政府特许的银行的首席监管官允许约100家银行在证明其偿付能力后重新开业。我们评估了银行所有者更换管理层、与存款人签订合同以延长负债期限结构、核销不良资产和/或注入资本等行动是否影响了银行的生存和存款留存。这一历史事件特别具有启发性，因为当时没有政府干预的预期。我们发现，与存款人签订合同提供了短期利益，而处理不良资产是长期生存能力的关键。

30225.title: Trade Policy and Global Sourcing: An Efficiency Rationale for Tariff Escalation
30225.zh_title: 贸易政策与全球采购：关税升级的效率理由
30225.authors: Pol Antràs, Teresa C. Fort, Agustín Gutiérrez, Felix Tintelnot
30225.abstract: Import tariffs tend to be higher for final goods than for inputs, a phenomenon commonly referred to as tariff escalation. Yet neoclassical trade theory – and modern Ricardian trade models, in particular – predict that welfare-maximizing tariffs are uniform across sectors. We show that tariff escalation can be rationalized on efficiency grounds in the presence of scale economies. When both downstream and upstream sectors produce under increasing returns to scale, a unilateral tariff in either sector boosts the size and productivity of that sector, raising welfare. While these forces are reinforced up the chain for final-good tariffs, input tariffs may drive final-good producers to relocate abroad, mitigating their potential productivity benefits. The welfare benefits of final-good tariffs thus tend to be larger, with the optimal degree of tariff escalation increasing in the extent of downstream returns to scale. A quantitative evaluation of the US-China trade war demonstrates that any welfare gains from the increase in US tariffs are overwhelmingly driven by final-good tariffs.
30225.zh_abstract: 进口关税往往对最终产品高于对投入品，这一现象通常被称为关税升级。然而，新古典贸易理论——尤其是现代李嘉图贸易模型——预测福利最大化的关税在各行业间应是统一的。我们证明，在存在规模经济的情况下，关税升级可以在效率基础上得到合理化。当下游和上游行业都在规模报酬递增条件下生产时，任一行业的单边关税都会提升该行业的规模和生产率，从而提高福利。虽然这些力量对最终产品关税在产业链上得到加强，但投入品关税可能促使最终产品生产商将生产转移到国外，从而削弱其潜在的生产率收益。因此，最终产品关税的福利收益往往更大，最优关税升级程度随下游规模报酬程度的提高而增加。对中美贸易战的定量评估表明，美国关税增加带来的任何福利收益主要来自最终产品关税。

30224.title: Training, Communications Patterns, and Spillovers Inside Organizations
30224.zh_title: 组织内部的培训、沟通模式与溢出效应
30224.abstract: This paper examines how training affects productivity across hierarchical layers within organizations. After a randomized training program for frontline employees at a government agency, trained workers' output increased while their requests for managerial assistance fell. This freed managers to focus on strategic tasks—particularly managers with the strongest connections to trained employees. A structural model of organizational hierarchies shows that spillovers to managers account for approximately 45% of the program's total benefits, indicating that evaluations focused solely on individual trainees may substantially understate the full value of training investments.
30224.zh_abstract: 本文研究了培训如何影响组织内各层级的生产率。在对某政府机构的一线员工进行随机培训项目后，受训员工的产出增加，同时他们向管理层寻求帮助的请求减少。这使得管理者能够专注于战略任务——尤其是那些与受训员工联系最密切的管理者。一个组织层级结构模型表明，对管理者的溢出效应约占该项目总收益的45%，这表明仅关注个体受训者的评估可能会大幅低估培训投资的全部价值。
30224.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PR；JEL：J24, L2, M5, M53

30223.title: Foundation of the Small Open Economy Model with Product Differentiation
30223.zh_title: 具有产品差异化的小型开放经济模型的基础
30223.abstract: We derive a small open economy (SOE) as the limit of an economy as the number or size of its trading partners goes to infinity and trade costs also go to infinity. We obtain this limit in the Armington, Eaton-Kortum, Krugman, and Melitz models. In all cases, the trade of the SOE with the foreign countries approaches a finite limit, and the domestic expenditure share for the SOE approaches a limit that is not zero or unity. The foreign countries can be either infinitely many SOEs, or alternatively, one or many large countries with domestic expenditure shares that approach unity. We illustrate the usefulness of this framework by obtaining a formula for the optimal tariff in the SOE -- depending on the elasticity of domestic wages with respect to the tariff -- that is consistent with all models.
30223.zh_abstract: 我们将小型开放经济推导为一种经济的极限，该经济中贸易伙伴的数量或规模趋于无穷大，同时贸易成本也趋于无穷大。我们在阿明顿模型、伊顿-科图姆模型、克鲁格曼模型和梅里兹模型中得到了这一极限。在所有情况下，小型开放经济与外国的贸易趋近于一个有限极限，小型开放经济的国内支出份额趋近于一个既不为零也不为一的极限。外国可以是无限多个小型开放经济，或者是一个或多个国内支出份额趋近于一的较大国家。我们通过推导小型开放经济中最优关税的公式——该公式取决于国内工资对关税的弹性——来说明这一框架的有用性，且该公式与所有模型一致。

30222.title: Intermediary Balance Sheets and the Treasury Yield Curve
30222.zh_title: 中介机构资产负债表与国债收益率曲线
30222.authors: Wenxin Du, Benjamin M. Hébert, Wenhao Li
30222.abstract: We document a regime change in the Treasury market post-Global Financial Crisis (GFC): dealers switched from net short to net long Treasury bonds. We construct “net-long” and “netshort” curves that account for balance sheet and financing costs, and show that actual yields moved from the net short curve pre-GFC to the net long curve post-GFC. Our theory shows the regime shift caused negative swap spreads and co-movement among swap spreads, dealer positions, and covered-interest-parity violations. Furthermore, the effects of various monetary and regulatory policies are regime-dependent. We highlight Treasury supply as a plausible driver of this regime shift.
30222.zh_abstract: 我们记录了全球金融危机后国债市场的一个制度变迁：交易商从净空头转为净多头国债。我们构建了考虑资产负债表和融资成本的“净多头”和“净空头”曲线，并显示实际收益率从危机前的净空头曲线移动到危机后的净多头曲线。我们的理论表明，这一制度变迁导致了负的互换利差，以及互换利差、交易商头寸和抛补利率平价偏离之间的共同变动。此外，各种货币和监管政策的效果具有制度依赖性。我们强调国债供给是这一制度变迁的一个可能驱动因素。
30222.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：F3, G12, G15, G2

30221.title: The Shadow of the Neolithic Revolution on Life Expectancy: A Double-Edged Sword
30221.zh_title: 新石器时代革命对预期寿命的阴影：一把双刃剑
30221.authors: Raphaël Franck, Oded Galor, Omer Moav, Ömer Özak
30221.abstract: This research explores the persistent effect of the Neolithic Revolution on the evolution of life expectancy in the course of human history. It advances the hypothesis and establishes empirically that the onset of the Neolithic Revolution and the associated rise in infectious diseases triggered a process of adaptation reducing mortality from infectious diseases while increasing the propensity for autoimmune and inflammatory diseases. Exploiting an exogenous source of variation in the timing of the Neolithic Revolution across French regions, the analysis establishes the presence of these conflicting forces - the beneficial effects on life expectancy before the second epidemiological transition and their adverse effects thereafter.
30221.zh_abstract: 本研究探讨了新石器时代革命对人类历史进程中预期寿命演变的持续影响。我们提出假设并通过实证建立，新石器时代革命的开始以及随之而来的传染病增加，触发了一个适应过程，降低了传染病的死亡率，同时增加了自身免疫性疾病和炎症性疾病的倾向。利用法国各地区新石器时代革命时间的外生变异，分析证实了这些相互冲突的力量的存在——在第二次流行病学转变之前对预期寿命的有利影响，以及在此之后的不利影响。

30220.title: Pareto Improvements in the Contest for College Admissions
30220.zh_title: 大学招生竞争中的帕累托改进
30220.authors: Kala Krishna, Sergey Lychagin, Wojciech Olszewski, Ron Siegel, Chloe Tergiman
30220.abstract: College admissions in many countries are based on a centrally administered test. Applicants invest a great deal of resources to improve their performance on the test, and there is growing concern about the large costs associated with these activities. We consider modifying such tests by introducing performance-disclosure policies that pool intervals of performance rankings, and investigate how such policies can improve students’ welfare in a Pareto sense. Pooling aﬀects the equilibrium allocation of studentso colleges, which hurts some students and beneﬁts others, but also aﬀects the eﬀort students exert. We characterize the Pareto frontier of Pareto improving policies, and also identify improvements that are robust to the distribution of college seats.\n\nWe illustrate the potential applicability of our results with an empirical estimation that uses data on college admissions in Turkey. We ﬁnd that a policy that pools a large fraction of the lowest performing students leads to a Pareto improvement in a contest based on the estimated parameters. We then conduct a laboratory experiment based on the estimated parameters to examine the eﬀect of such pooling on subjects’ behavior. The ﬁndings generally support our theoretical predictions. Our work suggests that identifying and introducing Pareto improving performance-disclosure policies may be a feasible and practical way to improve college admissions based on centralized tests.
30220.zh_abstract: 许多国家的大学招生基于统一组织的考试。申请者投入大量资源以提高考试成绩，人们日益担忧这些活动带来的巨大成本。我们考虑通过引入绩效披露政策来修改此类考试，该政策将绩效排名的区间进行合并，并研究此类政策如何能在帕累托意义上改善学生的福利。合并会影响学生与大学之间的均衡分配，这伤害一些学生而惠及其他学生，但也会影响学生付出的努力。我们刻画了帕累托改进政策的帕累托前沿，并识别出对大学名额分布具有稳健性的改进。

30268.title: What Motivates Leaders to Invest in Nation-Building?
30268.zh_title: 什么激励领导者投资于国家建设？
30268.authors: Paola Giuliano, Bryony Reich, Alessandro Riboni
30268.abstract: Why do some leaders invest in significant nation-building policies and others do not? Why does nation-building occur at certain junctures in time and not others? In our research, we investigate what motivates leaders to nation build. We argue that threats to their regime motivate rulers to invest in significant nation-building and that the type of threats that provoke nation-building have largely materialized since the 19th century.
30268.zh_abstract: 为什么有些领导者会投资于重大的国家建设政策，而另一些则不会？为什么国家建设会在某些历史节点发生，而在其他时候则不会？在我们的研究中，我们调查了是什么激励领导者进行国家建设。我们认为，对其政权的威胁促使统治者投资于重大的国家建设，而自19世纪以来，引发国家建设的威胁类型已基本显现。

30267.title: A New Interpretation of Productivity Growth Dynamics in the Pre-Pandemic and Pandemic Era U.S. Economy, 1950-2022
30267.zh_title: 对疫情前和疫情时代美国经济（1950-2022）生产率增长动态的新解释
30267.abstract: The dismal decade of 2010-19 recorded the slowest productivity growth of any decade in U.S. history, only 1.1 percent per year in the business sector. Yet the pandemic appears to have created a resurgence in productivity growth with a 4.1 percent rate achieved in the four quarters of 2020. This paper provides a unified framework that explains productivity growth in both the pre-pandemic and pandemic-era U.S. economy. The key insight is that in their panicked reaction to the collapse of output in the 2008-09 recession, business firms overreacted with “excess layoffs,” adjusting hours to the output decline with a far higher elasticity than normal. Our regression analysis, which allows post-recession rehiring that gradually unwinds the excess layoffs, explains why productivity growth was countercyclical in 2009 and why it was so slow in 2010-16 as rehiring boosted hours growth. Post-sample simulations explain why productivity growth was so high in 2020 and why it fell to only 0.6 percent in the five quarters of 2021-22. The paper includes implications for the future long-term evolution of productivity growth in the business sector and total economy. A new data file on quarterly productivity levels and changes for 17 industries provides new perspectives for 2006-22 and particularly for the nine pandemic quarters of 2020-22. Positive pandemic-era productivity growth can be entirely explained by a surge in the performance of work-from-home service industries, while goods industries soared and then slumped, while contact services recorded strongly negative productivity growth throughout 2020-22.
30267.zh_abstract: 2010-19年这惨淡的十年是美国历史上生产率增长最慢的十年，商业部门年均增长率仅为1.1%。然而，疫情似乎引发了生产率增长的复苏，2020年四个季度的增长率达到4.1%。本文提供了一个统一的框架来解释疫情前和疫情时代美国经济的生产率增长。关键见解在于，在2008-09年经济衰退中产出崩溃的恐慌反应下，企业过度反应，进行了“过度裁员”，以远高于正常水平的弹性将工时调整到产出下降。我们的回归分析允许衰退后的重新雇佣逐步消除过度裁员，这解释了为什么2009年生产率增长是逆周期的，以及为什么2010-16年生产率增长如此缓慢，因为重新雇佣推动了工时增长。样本外模拟解释了为什么2020年生产率增长如此之高，以及为什么在2021-22年的五个季度中生产率增长降至仅0.6%。本文还包含了对商业部门和整体经济未来长期生产率增长演变的启示。一个关于17个行业季度生产率水平和变化的新数据文件为2006-22年，特别是2020-22年九个疫情季度提供了新的视角。疫情时代的正生产率增长可以完全归因于居家办公服务业表现的激增，而商品行业先飙升后下滑，接触性服务业在2020-22年全年则录得强烈的负生产率增长。

30266.title: Firms and Unemployment Insurance Take-up
30266.zh_title: 企业与失业保险申领行为
30266.authors: Marta Lachowska, Isaac Sorkin, Stephen A. Woodbury
30266.abstract: We use administrative data to quantify the employer’s role in unemployment insurance (UI) take-up. First, there are employer effects in both claiming and appeals, and, consistent with deterrence effects, these are negatively correlated. Second, low-wage workers are less likely to claim and more likely to have their claims appealed than median-wage workers, and employer effects explain a large share of these income gradients. Third, high-claiming and low-appealing employers are desirable employers: they are higher-paying and have lower separation rates. Finally, the dominant source of targeting error in the UI system is that eligible workers do not apply. Our findings emphasize a novel dimension of the role of employers in the labor market, and have implications for the financing of UI.
30266.zh_abstract: 我们利用行政数据量化了雇主在失业保险申领中的作用。首先，雇主效应同时存在于申领和申诉环节，且与威慑效应一致，两者呈负相关。其次，与中位工资工人相比，低工资工人申领失业保险的可能性更低，而其申领被申诉的可能性更高，雇主效应解释了这些收入梯度的很大一部分。第三，高申领率和低申诉率的雇主是理想的雇主：他们支付更高的工资，且离职率更低。最后，失业保险体系中目标错误的主要来源是符合条件的工人没有提出申请。我们的研究结果强调了雇主在劳动力市场中作用的一个新维度，并对失业保险的融资具有启示意义。

30265.title: Fighting Climate Change: International Attitudes Toward Climate Policies
30265.zh_title: 应对气候变化：国际社会对气候政策的态度
30265.authors: Antoine Dechezleprêtre, Adrien Fabre, Tobias Kruse, Bluebery Planterose, Ana Sanchez Chico, Stefanie Stantcheva
30265.abstract: This paper explores global perceptions and understanding of climate change and policies, examining factors that influence support for climate action and the impact of different types of information. We conduct large-scale surveys with 40,000 respondents from 20 countries, providing new international data on attitudes towards climate change and respondents’ socioeconomic backgrounds and lifestyles. We identify three key perceptions affecting policy support: perceived effectiveness of policies in reducing emissions, their impact on low-income households, and their effect on respondents’ households (self-interest). Educational videos clarifying policy mechanisms increase support for climate policies; those merely highlighting climate change’s impacts do not.
30265.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了全球对气候变化及政策的认知与理解，考察了影响气候行动支持度的因素以及不同类型信息的影响。我们对来自20个国家的40,000名受访者进行了大规模调查，提供了关于气候变化态度以及受访者社会经济背景和生活方式的新国际数据。我们识别出影响政策支持的三个关键认知：政策在减排方面的感知有效性、对低收入家庭的影响，以及对受访者自身家庭的影响（自利动机）。阐明政策机制的教育视频增加了对气候政策的支持；而仅仅强调气候变化影响的视频则没有这种效果。
30265.meta: Programs：EEE, PE, POL；JEL：D78, H23, P48, Q54, Q58

30264.title: New Pricing Models, Same Old Phillips Curves?
30264.zh_title: 新定价模型，相同的旧菲利普斯曲线？
30264.authors: Adrien Auclert, Rodolfo D. Rigato, Matthew Rognlie, Ludwig Straub
30264.abstract: We show that, in a broad class of menu cost models, the first-order dynamics of aggregate inflation in response to arbitrary shocks to aggregate costs are nearly the same as in Calvo models with suitably chosen Calvo adjustment frequencies. We first prove that the canonical menu cost model is first-order equivalent to a mixture of two time-dependent models, which reflect the extensive and intensive margins of price adjustment. We then show numerically that, in any plausible parameterization, this mixture is well-approximated by a single Calvo model. This close numerical fit carries over to other standard specifications of menu cost models. Thus, for shocks that are not too large, the Phillips curve for a menu cost model looks like the New Keynesian Phillips curve, but with a higher slope.
30264.zh_abstract: 我们证明，在一大类菜单成本模型中，总通胀对总成本任意冲击的一阶动态与具有适当选择的Calvo调整频率的Calvo模型几乎相同。我们首先证明，经典的菜单成本模型在一阶上等价于两个时间依赖模型的混合，这两个模型分别反映了价格调整的广延边际和集约边际。然后，我们通过数值模拟表明，在任何合理的参数化下，这种混合可以被一个单一的Calvo模型很好地近似。这种紧密的数值拟合也适用于菜单成本模型的其他标准设定。因此，对于不太大的冲击，菜单成本模型的菲利普斯曲线看起来像新凯恩斯菲利普斯曲线，但具有更高的斜率。

30263.title: Carbon Pricing, Clean Electricity Standards, and Clean Electricity Subsidies on the Path to Zero Emissions
30263.zh_title: 通往零排放道路上的碳定价、清洁电力标准与清洁电力补贴
30263.abstract: We categorize the primary incentive-based mechanisms under consideration for addressing greenhouse gas emissions from electricity generation—pricing carbon, setting intensity standards, and subsidizing clean energy—and compare their market outcomes under similar expansions of clean electricity generation. While pricing emissions gives strong incentives to first eliminate generation with the highest social cost, a clean energy standard incentivizes earliest phaseout of the generation with the highest private cost. We show that the importance of this distinction depends on the correlation between private costs and emissions rates. We then estimate this correlation for US electricity generation and fuel prices as of 2019. The results indicate that the emissions difference between a carbon tax and clean energy standard that phase out fossil fuel generation over the same timeframe may actually be quite small, though it depends on fossil fuel prices during the phaseout. We also discuss how each of these policy options is likely to impact electricity prices, quantity demanded, government revenue, and economic efficiency. Large pre-existing markups of retail electricity prices over marginal costs are likely to considerably weaken or even reverse the usual assumed efficiency advantage of carbon pricing policies over alternatives, including direct subsidization of clean electricity generation.
30263.zh_abstract: 我们将目前考虑用于解决电力生产温室气体排放的主要基于激励的机制——碳定价、设定强度标准和补贴清洁能源——进行分类，并在清洁电力发电量类似扩张的情况下比较它们的市场结果。虽然排放定价强烈激励首先淘汰社会成本最高的发电方式，但清洁能源标准则激励首先淘汰私人成本最高的发电方式。我们表明，这种区别的重要性取决于私人成本与排放率之间的相关性。然后，我们估算了截至2019年美国电力生产和燃料价格的这种相关性。结果表明，在相同时间框架内逐步淘汰化石燃料发电的碳税和清洁能源标准之间的排放差异实际上可能非常小，尽管这取决于淘汰期间的化石燃料价格。我们还讨论了每种政策选项可能如何影响电价、需求量、政府收入和经济效率。零售电价相对于边际成本存在巨大的预先加价，这很可能大大削弱甚至逆转通常假设的碳定价政策相对于其他替代方案（包括直接补贴清洁电力发电）的效率优势。

30262.title: Confidence, Self-Selection and Bias in the Aggregate
30262.zh_title: 信心、自我选择与总体偏差
30262.authors: Benjamin Enke, Thomas Graeber, Ryan Oprea
30262.abstract: The influence of behavioral biases on aggregate outcomes like prices and allocations depends in part on self-selection: whether rational people opt more strongly into aggregate interactions than biased individuals. We conduct a series of betting market, auction and committee experiments using 15 classic cognitive bias tasks. We document that some cognitive errors are strongly reduced through self-selection, while others are not affected at all. A large part of this variation is explained by the quality of people's meta-cognition. In some cognitive tasks, confidence and performance are strongly positively correlated, while for others this link is absent or even negative.
30262.zh_abstract: 行为偏差对价格和配置等总体结果的影响部分取决于自我选择：理性人是否比有偏差的个体更强烈地选择参与总体互动。我们利用15个经典认知偏差任务进行了一系列博彩市场、拍卖和委员会实验。我们记录到，一些认知错误通过自我选择被大大减少，而另一些则完全不受影响。这种差异的很大一部分可以通过人们元认知的质量来解释。在某些认知任务中，信心和表现呈强正相关，而在其他任务中，这种联系不存在甚至是负的。

30261.title: New Evidence on the Demand for Advice within Retirement Plans
30261.zh_title: 退休计划内咨询需求的新证据
30261.abstract: We study demand for advice within defined contribution retirement plans offered by 23 institutions where TIAA is sole recordkeeper. Advice seeking increases with age, account balance, annual contribution level, web access, and changes in marital status. More provocatively, participants who invest solely through target date funds—the dominant default investment option—are significantly less likely to seek any form of advice throughout the age distribution, raising the possibility that reliance upon defaults crowds out advice seeking. Advice seeking increases significantly following the introduction of online tools, but is only weakly correlated with market returns and investment menu changes.
30261.zh_abstract: 我们研究了由23家机构提供的固定缴款退休计划中对咨询的需求，这些机构中TIAA是唯一的记录保管人。寻求咨询的行为随年龄、账户余额、年度缴款水平、网络访问权限以及婚姻状况的变化而增加。更具争议性的是，仅通过目标日期基金（主要的默认投资选项）进行投资的参与者，在整个年龄分布中寻求任何形式咨询的可能性都显著降低，这增加了依赖默认选项会挤出咨询寻求行为的可能性。在线工具的引入显著增加了寻求咨询的行为，但该行为与市场回报和投资菜单变化仅呈弱相关。

30260.title: Expectations and the Rate of Inflation
30260.abstract: What is the effect of higher expectations of future inflation on current inflation? I compute this passthrough for a series of canonical firm-pricing models, but allowing for arbitrary (non-rational) expectations. In the Calvo model, the expectational-passthrough can be made arbitrarily close to zero for sufficiently high stickiness, but in practice, for reasonable parameters, passthrough is close to its upper bound of 1. In the Taylor model, in contrast, the upper bound for passthrough is ½ instead of 1. For a general time-dependent model I show that: (i) passthrough is given by a measurable sufficient statistic: the ratio of the average duration of ongoing price spells to that of completed price spells; (ii) the lowest theoretically possible passthrough equals ½ by Taylor pricing; and (iii) passthrough can be theoretically greater than 1 with hazards that decrease over time; (iv) breaking down the passthrough across horizons, it is expectations in the near future that matters the most, expectations of long-run inflation are completely irrelevant; (v) I provide a generalized Phillips curve for current inflation as a linear function of expectations of future inflation and realized past inflations; (vi) I show that the sum of all coefficients, both past and future, sums to one, so that the long-run Phillips curve is vertical. Finally, I study state-dependent “menu cost” models and show that passthrough in these models can be extremely low or extremely high, depending on the exact specification and inflation rate. I suggest a model where firms must pay a fixed cost for changing their sS pricing policy bands. This extension gives a passthrough of 0 for small enough changes in expectations.
30260.zh_abstract: 更高的未来通胀预期对当前通胀的影响是什么？我计算了一系列经典企业定价模型中的这种传导效应，但允许任意（非理性）预期。在Calvo模型中，对于足够高的粘性，预期传导可以任意接近于零，但在实践中，对于合理的参数，传导接近其上限1。相比之下，在Taylor模型中，传导的上限是1/2而不是1。对于一个一般的时间依赖模型，我证明：(i) 传导由一个可测的充分统计量给出：正在进行的价格持续期的平均持续时间与已完成的价格持续期的平均持续时间之比；(ii) 理论上可能的最低传导等于1/2，由Taylor定价实现；(iii) 当风险率随时间递减时，传导理论上可以大于1；(iv) 按期限分解传导，近期预期最为重要，长期通胀预期完全无关；(v) 我提供了一个广义菲利普斯曲线，将当前通胀表示为未来通胀预期和已实现过去通胀的线性函数；(vi) 我证明所有系数（包括过去和未来）之和为1，因此长期菲利普斯曲线是垂直的。最后，我研究了状态依赖的“菜单成本”模型，并表明这些模型中的传导可能极低或极高，具体取决于确切的设定和通胀率。我提出了一个模型，其中企业必须为改变其sS定价政策区间支付固定成本。这种扩展对于足够小的预期变化给出了0的传导。

30259.title: Ancestral Livelihoods and Moral Universalism: Evidence from Transhumant Pastoralist Societies
30259.zh_title: 祖先生计与道德普遍主义：来自游牧畜牧社会的证据
30259.abstract: Moral universalism, the extent to which individuals exhibit similar altruism and trust towards in-group and out-group members, varies widely across societies. We test the hypothesis from anthropology that the requirements of transhumant pastoralism – a livelihood in which populations seasonally migrate and herd livestock – made individuals highly interdependent and cohesive within groups but hostile to individuals beyond the radius of extended kin. Using global data, we find that historical reliance on transhumant pastoralism is strongly predictive of greater in-group relative to out-group trust. This result is consistent across countries, between residents of the same country, among second-generation migrants, and with an instrumental variable strategy. We find evidence that these results are specific to transhumant pastoralism. The effects are particularly pronounced when transhumant pastoralists interact with groups that rely on other forms of economic production and in areas that are prone to climate shocks and conflict. Finally, we explore the economic implications of limited moral universalism. We find that greater reliance on transhumant pastoralism is associated with less objective promotion criteria within firms and smaller firm size.
30259.zh_abstract: 道德普遍主义，即个体对内群体和外群体成员表现出相似利他主义和信任的程度，在不同社会中差异很大。我们检验了来自人类学的假设：游牧畜牧生计——一种人口季节性迁徙并放牧牲畜的生计方式——使得个体在群体内高度相互依赖和凝聚，但对超出亲属关系半径的个体充满敌意。利用全球数据，我们发现历史上对游牧畜牧的依赖强烈预示着相对于外群体信任而言更高的内群体信任。这一结果在国家之间、同一国家的居民之间、第二代移民中以及使用工具变量策略时都是一致的。我们发现有证据表明这些结果是游牧畜牧所特有的。当游牧畜牧者与依赖其他经济生产形式的群体互动时，以及在容易发生气候冲击和冲突的地区，这种效应尤为显著。最后，我们探讨了有限道德普遍主义的经济含义。我们发现，对游牧畜牧的更大依赖与公司内较少的客观晋升标准以及较小的公司规模相关。

30258.title: The Real State: Inside the Congo's Traffic Police Agency
30258.zh_title: 真实状况：刚果交通警察局内部探秘
30258.authors: Raúl Sanchez de la Sierra, Kristof Titeca, Haoyang (Stan) Xie, Albert Malukisa Nkuku, Aimable Amani Lameke
30258.abstract: This paper provides insight into a corruption scheme in Kinshasa’s traffic police agency. First, various data collection branches show that the agency’s revenue is five times that from fines and is derived from a coalition of traffic police officials, their managers, and judicial police officers scheming to extort drivers. Second, the analysis of an experiment suggests that the scheme subverts service. Third, the scheme appears to be a rational response to the context but its logic is widespread. The findings suggest that coalitions of officials, while being socially costly, can yield large illicit revenue, challenging the notion of state weakness.
30258.zh_abstract: 本文深入剖析了金沙萨交通警察局内部的一个腐败体系。首先，多个数据收集分支显示，该机构的收入是罚款收入的五倍，这些收入来源于交通警察官员、他们的上级以及司法警察官员组成的联盟，他们合谋勒索司机。其次，对一项实验的分析表明，这一体系破坏了服务。第三，该体系看似是对当前环境的理性反应，但其逻辑具有普遍性。研究结果表明，官员联盟虽然社会成本高昂，却能产生巨额非法收入，这对“国家虚弱”的观点提出了挑战。
30258.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D23, D73, O1

30257.title: Aftermarket Frictions and the Cost of Off-Platform Options in Centralized Assignment Mechanisms
30257.zh_title: 二级市场摩擦与集中分配机制中平台外选项的成本
30257.authors: Adam Kapor, Mohit Karnani, Christopher Neilson
30257.abstract: We study the welfare and human-capital impacts of the configuration of on- and off-platform options in the context of Chile’s centralized higher education platform, leveraging administrative data and two policy changes: an expansion of the number of on-platform slots by approximately 40% and the introduction of a large scholarship program. We first show that more programs’ joining the platform led students to start college sooner and raised the share of students who graduated on time. We then develop a model of college applications, offers, waitlists, and matriculation choices, which we estimate using students’ ranked-ordered applications, on- and off-platform enrollment, and on-time graduation outcomes. When more programs join the platform, welfare increases, and the extent of aftermarket frictions matters less for welfare, enrollment, and graduation rates. High-SES students have greater access to off-platform options, and gains from platform expansion are larger for students from lower-SES backgrounds. Our results indicate that expanding the scope of a higher education platform can have real impacts on welfare and human capital.
30257.zh_abstract: 我们利用智利集中式高等教育平台的数据以及两项政策变化——平台内名额增加约40%和引入大规模奖学金项目——研究了平台内和平台外选项配置对福利和人力资本的影响。我们首先发现，更多项目加入平台促使学生更早开始上大学，并提高了按时毕业的学生比例。随后，我们构建了一个包含大学申请、录取、候补名单和入学选择的模型，并使用学生的排序申请、平台内外入学以及按时毕业结果的数据进行估计。当更多项目加入平台时，福利增加，且二级市场摩擦的程度对福利、入学率和毕业率的影响变小。高社会经济地位（SES）的学生有更多机会获得平台外选项，而平台扩张对低SES背景学生的收益更大。我们的结果表明，扩大高等教育平台的范围可以对福利和人力资本产生实质性影响。

30256.title: A Luna-tic Stablecoin Crash
30256.zh_title: 一场“月神”般的稳定币崩盘
30256.abstract: After remaining close to 1 US Dollar since its inception in November 2020, the algorithmic stablecoin UST crashed in the two weeks of May 9th to May 15th, 2022, leading to a price collapse of the underlying LUNA token and the erasure of more than 50 Billion U.S. Dollar or 90% in market value.\nI provide a novel theory to account for these phenomena and use it to shed light on the data. I break new ground methodologically by showing how crashes unfold gradually, and by introducing the method of quantitative interpretation. To obtain a gradual unfolding of the crash, I allow for the possibility that the market might return to normal at any moment. Suspension of convertibility happens, once the price has fallen sufficiently far. Agents price LUNA, taking into account these probabilities as well as the ongoing inflow from burning UST coins. Agents sell their UST coins when the probability of an eventual suspension of convertibility exceeds some agent-specific threshold. The implications of the theory are highlighted in an analytically tractable example. The theory is then used as a guide to examine and interpret the data, using bi-hourly observations. I use the observed data to quantify theory variables and use them in turn to interpret the data. I find that the majority of the UST coin holders waited until the probability of suspension was rather high, before deciding to burn their holdings.
30256.zh_abstract: 算法稳定币UST自2020年11月问世以来，其价格一直保持在接近1美元的水平，但在2022年5月9日至15日的两周内崩溃，导致其底层LUNA代币价格暴跌，市值蒸发超过500亿美元或90%。我提出一个新理论来解释这些现象，并利用该理论来阐明数据。我在方法论上取得突破，展示了崩盘如何逐步展开，并引入了定量解释的方法。为了获得崩盘的逐步展开过程，我允许市场随时可能恢复正常。一旦价格下跌到足够程度，就会暂停兑换。代理人在定价LUNA时，会考虑这些概率以及燃烧UST代币带来的持续流入。当最终暂停兑换的概率超过某个代理人特定的阈值时，代理人就会出售其UST代币。该理论的启示在一个可解析处理的例子中得到强调。然后，该理论被用作指南，利用每两小时的观测数据来检验和解释数据。我使用观测数据来量化理论变量，并反过来用它们来解释数据。我发现，大多数UST代币持有者一直等到暂停兑换的概率相当高时，才决定燃烧其持有的代币。
30256.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E41, F31, F32, G01, G12, G23

30255.title: Misinformation, Consumer Risk Perceptions, and Markets: The Impact of an Information Shock on Vaping and Smoking Cessation
30255.zh_title: 错误信息、消费者风险认知与市场：信息冲击对电子烟使用和戒烟的影响
30255.authors: Lawrence Jin, Donald S. Kenkel, Michael F. Lovenheim, Alan D. Mathios, Hua Wang
30255.abstract: Smoking is the leading preventable cause of death in the U.S. Because e-cigarettes do not involve the combustion of tobacco, vaping offers the potential to prevent most of the health consequences of smoking. We study the impact of an information shock created by an outbreak of lung injuries apparently related to e-cigarettes.
