We use data from multiple sources: surveys of risk perceptions conducted before, during, and after the outbreak; an in-depth survey we conducted on risk perceptions and vaping and smoking behavior; and national aggregate time-series sales data. We find that after the outbreak, consumer perceptions of the riskiness of e-cigarettes sharply increased, so that in contrast to almost all experts, the majority of consumers perceive e-cigarettes to be relatively and absolutely riskier than cigarettes. From our estimated e-cigarette demand models, we conclude that the information shock reduced e-cigarette demand by about 30 percent. We also estimate that the information shock decreased the use of e-cigarettes for smoking cessation, again by about 30 percent. Over time, the reduced smoking cessation due to the information shock will in turn increase smoking-related illness and death.
30255.zh_abstract: 吸烟是美国可预防的主要死因。由于电子烟不涉及烟草燃烧，因此使用电子烟有可能预防吸烟带来的大部分健康后果。我们研究了一次信息冲击的影响，该冲击源于一场显然与电子烟相关的肺部疾病爆发。我们使用了多个来源的数据：在爆发前、中、后进行的风险认知调查；我们进行的一项关于风险认知以及电子烟使用和吸烟行为的深入调查；以及全国性的时间序列销售数据。我们发现，爆发后，消费者对电子烟风险性的认知急剧上升，以至于与几乎所有专家相反，大多数消费者认为电子烟比香烟相对和绝对风险更高。根据我们估计的电子烟需求模型，我们得出结论，信息冲击使电子烟需求减少了约30%。我们还估计，信息冲击使使用电子烟戒烟的行为减少了约30%。随着时间的推移，信息冲击导致的戒烟减少将反过来增加与吸烟相关的疾病和死亡。

30254.title: Financing Health Care Delivery
30254.abstract: I review the key issues that arise in financing health care delivery. I begin by documenting the key features of health care markets that make financing so central in this sector, such as the skewed and unpredictable nature of health care spending and market failures in health care delivery. I then review the key issues that public and private payers face in designing health care markets, from the proper mix of public and private provision to the role of risk bearing for consumers and providers. Finally, I illustrate how these issues manifest in practice by comparing the design of insurance systems in the United States and Canada.
30254.zh_abstract: 我回顾了为医疗服务提供融资时出现的关键问题。我首先记录了医疗市场的主要特征，这些特征使得融资在该领域如此核心，例如医疗支出的偏态和不可预测性以及医疗服务提供中的市场失灵。然后，我回顾了公共和私人支付者在设计医疗市场时面临的关键问题，从公共和私人提供的适当组合到消费者和提供者承担风险的角色。最后，我通过比较美国和加拿大保险制度的设计，说明了这些问题在实践中如何体现。

30253.title: A Portfolio Approach to Global Imbalances
30253.zh_title: 全球失衡的投资组合方法
30253.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Robert J. Richmond, Tony Zhang
30253.abstract: We use a portfolio-based framework to understand what drives the decline of the U.S. net foreign asset (NFA) position and the reversal in returns earned on the US NFA (exorbitant privilege). We show that global savings gluts and monetary policies widened the U.S. NFA position, while investor demand shifts partially offset this widening. Moreover, U.S. privilege declined after 2010, in accordance with increasing foreign demand for U.S. equity. We also highlight a quantity dimension of the U.S. privilege: the U.S. can issue substantially more debt than other countries for a given yield increase.
30253.zh_abstract: 我们使用一个基于投资组合的框架来理解是什么推动了美国净外国资产（NFA）头寸的下降以及美国NFA所获回报率的逆转（过高特权）。我们表明，全球储蓄过剩和货币政策扩大了美国的NFA头寸，而投资者需求的转变部分抵消了这一扩大。此外，美国的特权在2010年后下降，这与外国对美国股票需求的增加相一致。我们还强调了美国特权的一个数量维度：在给定收益率增长的情况下，美国可以比其他国家发行多得多的债务。

30252.title: Racial Inequality in the U.S. Unemployment Insurance System
30252.zh_title: 美国失业保险制度中的种族不平等
30252.authors: Daphné Skandalis, Ioana Marinescu, Maxim N. Massenkoff
30252.abstract: The decentralized US unemployment insurance (UI) system lets states decide on key rules. Decentralization could help states efficiently adapt to local economic conditions, but it could also generate racial inequality. We build a novel nationally representative dataset of UI claimants and document a 18:3% gap in UI entitlements between Black and white claimants. After accounting for claimants' work history, we show that state rules differences alone create a 8:4% racial gap. Yet, our welfare analysis indicates that state rules differences are inefficient. Reducing UI rule disparities across states would thus enhance both racial equity and economic efficiency.
30252.zh_abstract: 分散化的美国失业保险（UI）制度允许各州决定关键规则。分散化可能有助于各州有效适应地方经济状况，但也可能产生种族不平等。我们构建了一个新颖的、具有全国代表性的UI申领人数据集，并记录了黑人和白人申领人之间18.3%的UI福利差距。在考虑了申领人的工作历史后，我们表明仅州规则差异就造成了8.4%的种族差距。然而，我们的福利分析表明，州规则差异是低效的。因此，减少各州之间的UI规则差异将同时增强种族公平和经济效率。

30251.title: The Spanish Mission Legacy on Native American Reservations
30251.zh_title: 西班牙传教团对美洲原住民保留地的遗产影响
30251.authors: Lee J. Alston, Marie Christine Duggan, Julio Alberto Ramos Pastrana
30251.abstract: We explore the long run impact of the Spanish missions on Native American outcomes in the early 20th century. Native communities who interacted with Spanish missionaries developed into enclaves which blended Catholicism with native culture. Some survived assaults on their property rights by Mexico and the US to persist as reservations into the 20th century. We found that having extensive contact with missions increased the percentage of Native Americans Catholic, decreased crime rates, and increased income from agriculture and overall earnings from wages. Surprisingly, we found no impact on education.
30251.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了西班牙传教团对20世纪初美洲原住民结果的长期影响。与西班牙传教士互动的原住民社区发展成了融合天主教与原住民文化的飞地。其中一些社区在经受墨西哥和美国对其财产权的攻击后幸存下来，作为保留地持续到20世纪。我们发现，与传教团的广泛接触增加了美洲原住民中信奉天主教的比例，降低了犯罪率，并增加了农业收入以及来自工资的总收入。令人惊讶的是，我们发现对教育没有影响。

30250.title: Expecting Floods: Firm Entry, Employment, and Aggregate Implications
30250.zh_title: 预期洪水：企业进入、就业与总体影响
30250.authors: Ruixue Jia, Xiao Ma, Victoria Wenxin Xie
30250.abstract: Flood events and flood risk have been increasing in the past few decades and have important consequences for the economy. Using county-level and ZIP-code-level data from the United States during 1998–2018, we document that (1) increased flood risk has a large negative impact on firm entry, employment, and output in the long run; and (2) flood events reduce output in the short run while their impact on firm entry and employment is limited. Motivated by these findings, we construct a spatial equilibrium model to characterize how flood risk shapes firms’ location choices and workers’ employment, which we use to estimate the aggregate impact of increased flood risk on the economy. We find that flood risk reduced U.S. aggregate output by 0.52% in 2018, 80% of which stemmed from expectation effects and 20% from direct damages. We also apply our model to study the distributional consequences and forecast the impact of future changes in flood risk. Our results highlight the importance of considering the adjustment of firms and workers in response to risk in evaluating the consequences of natural disasters.
30250.zh_abstract: 过去几十年中，洪水事件和洪水风险不断增加，并对经济产生重要影响。利用1998-2018年美国县级和邮政编码级数据，我们记录到：(1) 长期来看，洪水风险增加对企业进入、就业和产出有显著的负面影响；(2) 短期来看，洪水事件会减少产出，但对企业进入和就业的影响有限。受这些发现启发，我们构建了一个空间均衡模型来描述洪水风险如何塑造企业的选址决策和工人的就业选择，并利用该模型估计洪水风险增加对经济的总体影响。我们发现，2018年洪水风险使美国总产出减少了0.52%，其中80%源于预期效应，20%源于直接损害。我们还应用该模型研究了分配效应，并预测了未来洪水风险变化的影响。我们的结果强调了在评估自然灾害后果时，考虑企业和工人对风险进行调整的重要性。
30250.meta: Programs：EEE, ITI；JEL：F64, Q54, Q56, R11, R13

30249.title: Partisan Entrepreneurship
30249.authors: Joseph Engelberg, Jorge Guzman, Runjing Lu, William Mullins
30249.abstract: Republicans start more firms than Democrats. In a sample of 40 million party-identified Americans between 2005 and 2017, we find that 6% of Republicans and 4% of Democrats become entrepreneurs. This partisan entrepreneurship gap is time-varying: Republicans increase their relative entrepreneurship during Republican administrations and decrease it during Democratic administrations, amounting to a partisan reallocation of 170,000 new firms over our 13-year sample. We find sharp changes in partisan entrepreneurship around the elections of President Obama and President Trump, and the strongest effects among the most politically active partisans: those that donate and vote.
30249.zh_abstract: 共和党人比民主党人创办更多企业。在2005年至2017年间4000万有党派标识的美国人的样本中，我们发现6%的共和党人和4%的民主党人成为企业家。这种党派创业差距是随时间变化的：共和党人在共和党执政期间相对创业率上升，在民主党执政期间下降，这相当于在我们13年的样本期内，党派间重新分配了17万家新企业。我们发现，在奥巴马总统和特朗普总统当选前后，党派创业行为发生了急剧变化，并且在政治最活跃的党派成员（即那些捐款和投票的人）中影响最为显著。

30248.title: Another Day, Another Visit: Impact of Arkansas's Mandatory Waiting Period for Women Seeking an Abortion by Demographic Groups
30248.zh_title: 又一天，又一次就诊：阿肯色州强制等待期对不同人口群体寻求堕胎女性的影响
30248.abstract: Twenty-six states require that women seeking an abortion wait between 18 and 72 hours after receipt of counseling before the abortion can be completed. Thirteen states require that the counseling be given in person necessitating at least two visits to the provider. In April of 2015, Arkansas increased the waiting period for an abortion from 24 to 48 hours and more significantly, required that women receive the counseling in person. We use a regression discontinuity design to analyze the immediate effect of Arkansas’s 2015 mandatory waiting period (MWP) law on abortion rates. We use de-identified, individual-level data from the Arkansas Department of Health (DOH) on all abortions performed in Arkansas from 2000 to 2020. Abortion rates fell 17 percent among all women, but 22 percent among white non-Hispanics and 14 percent among black non-Hispanics immediately after the law went into effect. We show that the law decreased abortion rates the most among unmarried adults with children. Abortion is now illegal in Arkansas. Given the decline in abortion rates associated the MWP’s two-visit requirement, abortion rates will likely fall further as travel distance to the nearest legal provider increases.
30248.zh_abstract: 美国有26个州要求寻求堕胎的女性在接受咨询后等待18至72小时才能完成堕胎。13个州要求咨询必须当面进行，这意味着至少需要两次前往医疗机构。2015年4月，阿肯色州将堕胎等待期从24小时延长至48小时，更重要的是，要求女性必须当面接受咨询。我们采用断点回归设计分析阿肯色州2015年强制等待期法律对堕胎率的即时影响。我们使用了阿肯色州卫生部提供的2000年至2020年该州所有堕胎的去标识化个体层面数据。法律生效后，所有女性的堕胎率下降了17%，但非西班牙裔白人女性下降了22%，非西班牙裔黑人女性下降了14%。我们表明，该法律对有子女的未婚成年人堕胎率下降幅度最大。堕胎在阿肯色州现已非法。鉴于强制等待期的两次就诊要求导致堕胎率下降，随着前往最近合法堕胎机构的旅行距离增加，堕胎率可能会进一步下降。

30247.title: A New Way of Forecasting Recessions
30247.abstract: This paper proposes a new way of displaying and analyzing macroeconomic time series to form recession forecasts. The proposed data displays contain the last three years of each expansion. These allow observers to see for themselves what is different about the last year before recession. Based on a statistical model, the most recent data are then probabilistically inserted into these images where the recent data are most similar to the historical data. This amounts to a forecast. The traditional probit model used to forecast recessions inappropriately treats every observation as a separate experiment. This new method deals with these intra-correlation issues. The one variable that is causing a recession alarm is inflation. The unemployment rate is also alarming if the covid-19 data are omitted. The slope of the yield curve, the three-month Treasury yield, and housing starts are all two or three years from the end of the expansion. A probit model that conducts a “horse race” among these five variables reveals it is the bond market variables that best predict recessions. This leaves the Fed under control, but the 1970s data suggests it takes a recession to combat high inflation.
30247.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种展示和分析宏观经济时间序列以形成衰退预测的新方法。所提出的数据展示包含每次扩张期的最后三年。这使得观察者能够自行判断衰退前一年有何不同。基于一个统计模型，最新数据被概率性地插入到这些图像中，即最新数据与历史数据最相似的位置。这相当于一个预测。用于预测衰退的传统概率模型不恰当地将每次观测视为一个独立的实验。这种新方法处理了这些内部相关性问题。引发衰退警报的一个变量是通货膨胀。如果忽略新冠疫情数据，失业率也令人担忧。收益率曲线斜率、三个月期国债收益率和房屋开工率都距离扩张结束还有两到三年。一个在这五个变量之间进行“赛马”的概率模型显示，债券市场变量最能预测衰退。这使得美联储处于可控状态，但1970年代的数据表明，需要一场衰退来对抗高通胀。

30246.title: Short-Term Tax Cuts, Long-Term Stimulus
30246.authors: James Cloyne, Joseba Martinez, Haroon Mumtaz, Paolo Surico
30246.abstract: We study the macroeconomic effects of corporate income taxes on innovation and productivity in the United States. Using narrative-identified tax changes from 1950 to 2019, we find that temporary cuts in corporate tax rates lead to persistent increases in R&D, patenting, productivity, output, and broader measures of intangible investment. We interpret these findings with an estimated semi-endogenous growth model, whose implied sufficient statistics for innovation policy, elasticities of patenting with respect to taxes and social returns to R&D are consistent with the existing literature. The model highlights the tax amortization of intangible asset purchases as a key channel through which corporate taxes distort innovation. We provide direct evidence for the model mechanism using firm-level data: a cut in corporate taxes leads to a relative jump in the stock market valuation of the most intangible-intensive companies, followed by a sustained increase in R&D, intangible investment, and patenting, among these firms. Our results suggest that corporate income taxes create a first-order distortion to innovation and that the tax treatment of intangible assets is central to understanding the effects of corporate taxation.
30246.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国企业所得税对创新和生产率的宏观经济影响。利用1950年至2019年基于叙事识别的税收变化，我们发现企业所得税税率临时下调会导致研发、专利、生产率、产出以及更广泛的无形资产投资持续增加。我们用一个估计的半内生增长模型来解释这些发现，该模型隐含的创新政策充分统计量、专利对税收的弹性以及研发的社会回报率与现有文献一致。该模型强调了无形资产购买的税收摊销是企业所得税扭曲创新的关键渠道。我们利用企业层面数据为模型机制提供了直接证据：企业所得税削减导致无形资产最密集公司的股票市场估值相对跃升，随后这些公司的研发、无形资产投资和专利申请持续增加。我们的结果表明，企业所得税对创新造成了一阶扭曲，并且无形资产的税收待遇是理解企业所得税影响的核心。
30246.meta: Programs：ME；JEL：E23, E62, H24, H25, H31, H32, O32

30245.title: Malleability of Alcohol Consumption: Evidence from Migrants
30245.zh_title: 酒精消费的可塑性：来自移民的证据
30245.abstract: How malleable is alcohol consumption? Specifically, how much is alcohol consumption driven by the current environment versus individual characteristics? To answer this question, we analyze changes in alcohol purchases when consumers move from one state to another in the United States. We find that if a household moves to a state with a higher (lower) average alcohol purchases than the origin state, the household is likely to increase (decrease) its alcohol purchases right after the move. The current environment explains about two-thirds of the differences in alcohol purchases. The adjustment takes place both on the extensive and intensive margins.
30245.zh_abstract: 酒精消费的可塑性如何？具体来说，酒精消费在多大程度上受当前环境驱动，而非个人特征？为了回答这个问题，我们分析了消费者在美国从一个州迁移到另一个州时酒精购买量的变化。我们发现，如果一个家庭迁移到一个平均酒精购买量高于（低于）原籍州的州，该家庭在迁移后很可能会增加（减少）其酒精购买量。当前环境解释了约三分之二的酒精购买量差异。这种调整在广延边际和集约边际上均会发生。
30245.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：D12, I12, I18, L66

30244.title: Trade, Leakage, and the Design of a Carbon Tax
30244.authors: David Weisbach, Samuel S. Kortum, Michael Wang, Yujia Yao
30244.abstract: Climate policies vary widely across countries, with some countries imposing stringent emissions policies and others doing very little. When climate policies vary across countries, energy-intensive industries have an incentive to relocate to places with few or no emissions restrictions, an effect known as leakage. Relocated industries would continue to pollute but would be operating in a less desirable location. We consider solutions to the leakage problem in a simple setting where one region of the world imposes a climate policy and the rest of the world is passive. We solve the model analytically and also calibrate and simulate the model. Our model and analysis imply: (1) optimal climate policies tax both the supply of fossil fuels and the demand for fossil fuels; (2) on the demand side, absent administrative costs, optimal policies would tax both the use of fossil fuels in domestic production and the domestic consumption of goods created with fossil fuels, but with the tax rate on production lower due to leakage; (3) taxing only production (on the demand side), however, would be substantially simpler, and almost as effective as taxing both production and consumption, because it would avoid the need for border adjustments on imports of goods; (4) the effectiveness of the latter strategy depends on a low foreign elasticity of energy supply, which means that forming a taxing coalition to ensure a low foreign elasticity of energy supply can act as a substitute for border adjustments on goods
30244.zh_abstract: 各国气候政策差异很大，一些国家实施严格的排放政策，而另一些国家则几乎无所作为。当各国气候政策不同时，能源密集型行业有动机迁移到排放限制很少或没有的地方，这种效应被称为泄漏。迁移后的行业将继续污染，但会在一个不太理想的地点运营。我们考虑在一个简单的设定中解决泄漏问题，即世界的一个区域实施气候政策，而世界其他地区则保持被动。我们解析求解了该模型，并进行了校准和模拟。我们的模型和分析表明：(1) 最优气候政策既对化石燃料供应征税，也对化石燃料需求征税；(2) 在需求侧，如果没有行政成本，最优政策既会对国内生产中使用化石燃料征税，也会对使用化石燃料生产的商品的国内消费征税，但由于泄漏，生产税率会较低；(3) 然而，仅对生产征税（在需求侧）将大大简化，并且几乎与同时对生产和消费征税一样有效，因为它避免了需要对进口商品进行边境调整；(4) 后一种策略的有效性取决于较低的国外能源供给弹性，这意味着形成一个征税联盟以确保较低的国外能源供给弹性，可以作为商品边境调整的替代方案。
30244.meta: Programs：EEE, ITI, LE, PE；JEL：F18, H23, Q54

30243.title: Looming Large or Seeming Small? Attitudes Towards Losses in a Representative Sample
30243.zh_title: 显得巨大还是看似微小？代表性样本中对损失的态度
30243.authors: Jonathan Chapman, Erik Snowberg, Stephanie W. Wang, Colin Camerer
30243.abstract: We measure individual-level loss aversion using three incentivized, representative surveys of the U.S. population (combined N=3,000). We find that around 50% of the U.S. population is loss tolerant, with many participants accepting negative-expected-value gambles. This is counter to earlier findings—which mostly come from lab/student samples—and expert predictions that 70-90% of participants are loss averse. Consistent with the difference between our study and the prior literature, loss aversion is more prevalent in people with high cognitive ability. Loss-tolerant individuals are more likely to report recent gambling and to have experienced financial shocks. These results support the general hypothesis that individuals value gains and losses differently, although the tendency in a large proportion of the population to emphasize gains over losses is an overlooked behavioral phenomenon.
30243.zh_abstract: 我们利用三项有激励的代表性美国人口调查（总样本量N=3000）测量了个体层面的损失厌恶。我们发现，约50%的美国人口是损失容忍的，许多参与者接受了期望值为负的赌博。这与早期的发现（主要来自实验室/学生样本）以及专家预测（70-90%的参与者是损失厌恶的）相反。与我们的研究与先前文献的差异一致，损失厌恶在高认知能力人群中更为普遍。损失容忍的个体更有可能报告近期有赌博行为，并经历过财务冲击。这些结果支持了个人对收益和损失评价不同的总体假设，尽管在很大一部分人口中，强调收益胜过损失的倾向是一种被忽视的行为现象。
30243.meta: Programs：AP, DEV, LS, PE, POL；JEL：C81, C9, D03, D81, D9

30242.title: Ghosting the Tax Authority: Fake Firms and Tax Fraud
30242.zh_title: 幽灵企业：虚假公司与税务欺诈
30242.authors: Paul Carrillo, Dave Donaldson, Dina Pomeranz, Monica Singhal
30242.abstract: An important but poorly understood form of firm tax evasion arises from the use of "ghost firms"—fake firms that issue fraudulent receipts so that their clients can claim false deductions. We provide a unique window into this global phenomenon using transaction-level tax data from Ecuador. Ghost transactions are widespread, prevalent among large firms and firms with high-income owners, and exhibit suspicious patterns in comparison to ordinary transactions: bunching at round numbers, at the end of the fiscal year, and just below financial system thresholds. We go on to study an innovative enforcement intervention that targeted ghost clients rather than ghosts themselves, which led to substantial tax recovery.
30242.zh_abstract: 一种重要但鲜为人知的企业逃税形式涉及使用“幽灵公司”——即开具虚假收据以便客户虚报扣除的假公司。我们利用厄瓜多尔的交易级税收数据，为这一全球现象提供了独特的观察窗口。幽灵交易普遍存在，在大公司和高收入所有者拥有的公司中尤为常见，并且与普通交易相比呈现出可疑模式：集中在整数金额、财政年度末以及略低于金融系统门槛的位置。我们进一步研究了一项创新的执法干预措施，该措施针对的是幽灵客户而非幽灵公司本身，从而实现了可观的税收追回。

30241.title: Operating Hedge and Gross Profitability Premium
30241.zh_title: 经营对冲与总利润率溢价
30241.authors: Leonid Kogan, Jun Li, Harold Zhang
30241.abstract: We show theoretically that variable production costs lower systematic risk of firms’ cash flows if capital and variable inputs are complementary in firms’ production and input prices are pro-cyclical. In our dynamic model, this operating hedge effect is weaker for more profitable firms, giving rise to a gross profitability premium. Moreover, gross profitability and value factors are distinct and negatively correlated, and their premia are not captured by the CAPM. We estimate the model by the simulated method of moments, and find that its main implications for stock returns and cash flow dynamics are quantitatively consistent with the data.
30241.zh_abstract: 我们从理论上证明，如果资本和可变投入在生产中是互补的，且投入价格是顺周期的，那么可变生产成本会降低企业现金流的系统性风险。在我们的动态模型中，这种经营对冲效应对利润率更高的企业更弱，从而产生了总利润率溢价。此外，总利润率因子和价值因子是截然不同的且呈负相关，它们的溢价无法被资本资产定价模型所捕捉。我们通过模拟矩方法估计了该模型，并发现其对股票回报和现金流动态的主要含义在数量上与数据一致。

30292.title: How Hybrid Working From Home Works Out
30292.zh_title: 混合居家办公的效果如何
30292.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Ruobing Han, James Liang
30292.abstract: Hybrid working from home (hybrid), whereby employees work a mix of days at home and at work each week, has become common for graduate employees. This paper evaluates a randomized control trial of hybrid on 1612 graduate engineers, marketing and finance employees of a large technology firm. There are four key results. First, hybrid was highly valued by employees on average, reducing attrition by 33% and improving job-satisfaction measures. Second, hybrid reduced working hours on home days and increased them on office days and the weekend, altering the structure of the working week. Third, hybrid increased messaging and video calls, even when all employees were in the office, reflecting a move towards more electronic communication. Finally, there were large differences in the valuations of hybrid between managers and non-managers. Non-managers were more likely to volunteer into the hybrid experiment, to work from home on eligible days, to predict positive impacts on productivity, and to reduce their attrition under hybrid. In contrast, managers were less likely to volunteer, less likely to work from home on eligible days, predicted a negative average impact of hybrid on productivity, and saw increased attrition rates under hybrid.
30292.zh_abstract: 混合居家办公（hybrid），即员工每周部分时间在家办公、部分时间在办公室办公，已成为毕业生员工的常见模式。本文评估了一项针对一家大型科技公司1612名毕业生工程师、市场营销和财务员工的混合办公随机对照试验。有四个关键结果。第一，混合办公平均而言受到员工高度重视，使离职率降低33%，并提高了工作满意度指标。第二，混合办公减少了在家工作日的工时，增加了在办公室日和周末的工时，改变了工作周的结构。第三，混合办公增加了消息和视频通话，即使所有员工都在办公室时也是如此，反映出向更多电子化沟通的转变。最后，管理者与非管理者对混合办公的估值存在巨大差异。非管理者更有可能自愿参与混合办公实验，在符合条件的日子居家办公，预测对生产率的积极影响，并在混合办公下降低离职率。相比之下，管理者不太可能自愿参与，不太可能在符合条件的日子居家办公，预测混合办公对生产率的平均负面影响，并在混合办公下看到离职率上升。

30291.title: Simple Tests for Selection: Learning More from Instrumental Variables
30291.zh_title: 选择性的简单检验：从工具变量中了解更多
30291.authors: Dan A. Black, Joonhwi Joo, Robert LaLonde, Jeffrey A. Smith, Evan J. Taylor
30291.abstract: We provide simple tests for selection on unobserved variables in the Vytlacil-Imbens-Angrist framework for Local Average Treatment Effects (LATEs). Our setup allows researchers not only to test for selection on either or both of the treated and untreated outcomes, but also to assess the magnitude of the selection effect. We show that it applies to the standard binary instrument case, as well as to experiments with imperfect compliance and fuzzy regression discontinuity designs, and we link it to broader discussions regarding instrumental variables. We illustrate the substantive value added by our framework with three empirical applications drawn from the literature.
30291.zh_abstract: 我们在局部平均处理效应（LATE）的Vytlacil-Imbens-Angrist框架中，提供了针对未观测变量选择性的简单检验。我们的设置不仅允许研究者检验是否对处理结果或未处理结果存在选择性，还可以评估选择性效应的大小。我们表明，该方法适用于标准二元工具变量情形，以及存在不完全依从性的实验和模糊断点回归设计，并将其与关于工具变量的更广泛讨论联系起来。我们通过文献中的三个实证应用来说明我们框架的实质性附加值。

30290.title: American Agriculture, Water Resources, and Climate Change
30290.zh_title: 美国农业、水资源与气候变化
30290.abstract: This paper highlights the role of agriculture in the American economy and society over time and points to farmer historical and contemporary responses to varying climatic conditions. It indicates the importance of water as an input to agricultural production and identifies possible impacts of climate change on access to water. It then summarizes a set of eleven papers from an NBER research project on water, climate change, and the agricultural sector.
30290.zh_abstract: 本文强调了农业在美国经济和社会中随时间演变的作用，并指出了农民历史上及当代对多变气候条件的应对方式。文章说明了水作为农业生产投入要素的重要性，并识别了气候变化对水资源获取可能产生的影响。随后，文章总结了一个NBER研究项目中关于水、气候变化和农业部门的十一篇论文。

30289.title: Banking on Transparency for the Poor: Experimental Evidence from India
30289.zh_title: 为穷人押注透明度：来自印度的实验证据
30289.authors: Erica M. Field ⓡ Natalia Rigol ⓡ Charity M. Troyer Moore ⓡ Rohini Pande ⓡ Simone G. Schaner
30289.abstract: Do information frictions limit the benefits of financial inclusion drives for the rural poor? We evaluate an experimental intervention among recently banked poor Indian women receiving government cash transfers via direct deposit. Treated women were provided automated voice calls confirming details of transactions posted to their accounts. The intervention increased women's knowledge of account balances and trust in their local banking agent. Indicative of improved consumption-smoothing by income-constrained women, administrative data show that treated women accessed government transfers faster when the service was active, with treatment effects dissipating after the notifications were discontinued. On average, other aspects of account use remained unchanged. However, consistent with account information benefiting those with high transaction costs more, the intervention increased account use among women who lived more than an hour from the kiosk.
30289.zh_abstract: 信息摩擦是否会限制金融包容性举措对农村贫困人口的益处？我们评估了一项针对近期获得银行账户的印度贫困女性的实验性干预措施，这些女性通过直接存款接收政府现金转移支付。接受干预的女性会收到自动语音电话，确认其账户交易详情。该干预措施提高了女性对账户余额的了解以及对当地银行代理的信任。行政数据显示，在服务活跃期间，接受干预的女性更快地获取了政府转移支付，这表明收入受限女性的消费平滑得到了改善，但在通知停止后，处理效应逐渐消失。平均而言，账户使用的其他方面保持不变。然而，与账户信息对交易成本高的人更有益一致的是，该干预措施增加了居住在距离服务亭超过一小时路程的女性的账户使用。

30288.title: The Effect of Macroeconomic Uncertainty on Firm Decisions
30288.zh_title: 宏观经济不确定性对企业决策的影响
30288.authors: Saten Kumar, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Olivier Coibion
30288.abstract: Using a new survey of firms in New Zealand, we document how exogenous variation in the macroeconomic uncertainty perceived by firms affects their economic decisions. We use randomized information treatments that provide different types of information about the first and/or second moments of future economic growth to generate exogenous changes in the perceived macroeconomic uncertainty of some firms. The effects on their decisions relative to their initial plans as well as relative to an untreated control group are measured in a follow-up survey six months later. We find that as firms become more uncertain, they reduce their prices, employment, and investment, their sales decline, and they become less likely to invest in new technologies or open new facilities. These ex-post effects of uncertainty are similar to how firms say they would respond to higher uncertainty when asked hypothetical questions.
30288.zh_abstract: 利用一项针对新西兰企业的新调查，我们记录了企业感知到的宏观经济不确定性的外生变化如何影响其经济决策。我们采用随机信息处理方式，提供关于未来经济增长第一和/或第二矩的不同类型信息，以引起部分企业感知到的宏观经济不确定性的外生变化。在六个月后的后续调查中，我们测量了这些变化相对于企业初始计划以及相对于未接受处理的对照组对其决策的影响。我们发现，随着企业变得更加不确定，它们会降低价格、减少就业和投资，销售额下降，并且投资新技术或开设新设施的可能性降低。这些不确定性的事后效应与企业在被问及假设性问题时表示将如何应对更高不确定性的方式相似。

30287.title: Help Really Wanted? The Impact of Age Stereotypes in Job Ads on Applications from Older Workers
30287.zh_title: 真的需要帮助吗？招聘广告中的年龄刻板印象对老年工作者申请的影响
30287.authors: Ian Burn, Daniel Firoozi, Daniel Ladd, David Neumark
30287.abstract: Correspondence studies have found evidence of age discrimination in callback rates for older workers, but less is known about whether job advertisements can themselves shape the age composition of the applicant pool. We construct job ads for administrative assistant, retail, and security guard jobs, using language from real job ads collected in a prior large-scale correspondence study (Neumark et al., 2019a). We modify the job-ad language to randomly vary whether or not the job ad includes ageist language regarding age-related stereotypes. Our main analysis relies on machine learning methods to design job ads based on the semantic similarity between phrases in job ads and age-related stereotypes. In contrast to a correspondence study in which job searchers are artificial and researchers study the responses of real employers, in our research the job ads are artificial and we study the responses of real job searchers. \nWe find that job-ad language related to ageist stereotypes, even when the language is not blatantly or specifically age-related, deters older workers from applying for jobs. The change in the age distribution of applicants is large, with significant declines in the average and median age, the 75th percentile of the age distribution, and the share of applicants over 40. Based on these estimates and those from the correspondence study, and the fact that we use real-world ageist job-ad language, we conclude that job-ad language that deters older workers from applying for jobs can have roughly as large an impact on hiring of older workers as direct age discrimination in hiring.
30287.zh_abstract: 通信研究已发现老年工作者在回电率方面存在年龄歧视的证据，但关于招聘广告本身是否能塑造申请者的年龄构成，我们知之甚少。我们为行政助理、零售和保安职位构建了招聘广告，使用了先前一项大规模通信研究（Neumark et al., 2019a）中收集的真实招聘广告的语言。我们修改了招聘广告的语言，随机变化广告是否包含与年龄相关刻板印象有关的年龄歧视性语言。我们的主要分析依赖于机器学习方法，根据招聘广告中的短语与年龄相关刻板印象之间的语义相似性来设计招聘广告。与通信研究中求职者是虚构的、研究人员研究真实雇主的反应不同，在我们的研究中，招聘广告是虚构的，我们研究真实求职者的反应。我们发现，与年龄歧视性刻板印象相关的招聘广告语言，即使这些语言并非明显或专门与年龄相关，也会阻止老年工作者申请工作。申请者年龄分布的变化很大，平均年龄和中位年龄、年龄分布的第75百分位数以及40岁以上申请者的比例均显著下降。基于这些估计以及通信研究的估计，并且考虑到我们使用了现实世界中的年龄歧视性招聘广告语言，我们得出结论：阻止老年工作者申请工作的招聘广告语言对老年工作者招聘的影响，大致与招聘中的直接年龄歧视一样大。
30287.meta: Programs：AG, LE, LS, PE；JEL：J14, J6, J7, J78

30286.title: Are Menthol Smokers Different? An Economic Perspective
30286.zh_title: 薄荷醇吸烟者有何不同？一个经济学视角
30286.authors: Yu-Chun Cheng, Donald S. Kenkel, Alan D. Mathios, Hua Wang
30286.abstract: Of the 45.7 million current smokers in the U.S. age 12 and over, more than 18.5 million usually smoke menthol cigarettes. The Food and Drug Administration recently proposed a tobacco product standard that would prohibit menthol as a characterizing flavor in cigarettes. The FDA concludes that the prohibition of menthol in cigarettes is appropriate for public health, meeting the criterion established by the 2009 Tobacco Control Act. In this paper we explore whether there are internality-based market failures that provide an applied welfare economics rationale to prohibit menthol. Our empirical approach provides descriptive evidence from the 2018-2019 Tobacco Use Supplement to the Current Population Survey on how menthol use is associated with smokers’ market demand along multiple intensive and extensive margins. We also use direct measures of smoking-related misinformation and internalities, and stated preference data, from a 2021 Cornell Online Survey. We acknowledge that the associations we document in observational data might reflect bias due to self-selection into menthol use. We discuss several lines of evidence about whether self-selection into menthol use might be mainly quasi-random. We leave it to reader whether there is convincing evidence that differential levels of internality-based market failures are a sufficient justification for the proposed prohibition of menthol cigarettes.
30286.zh_abstract: 在美国12岁及以上的4570万当前吸烟者中，超过1850万人通常吸薄荷醇香烟。美国食品药品监督管理局最近提出了一项烟草产品标准，将禁止在香烟中使用薄荷醇作为特征风味。FDA得出结论，禁止香烟中的薄荷醇对公共健康是适当的，符合2009年《烟草控制法》确立的标准。在本文中，我们探讨是否存在基于内部性的市场失灵，为禁止薄荷醇提供应用福利经济学的理由。我们的实证方法利用2018-2019年当前人口调查的烟草使用补充数据，提供了关于薄荷醇使用如何与吸烟者在多个集约和广延边际上的市场需求相关联的描述性证据。我们还使用了2021年康奈尔在线调查中关于吸烟相关错误信息和内部性的直接测量，以及陈述偏好数据。我们承认，我们在观测数据中记录的相关性可能反映了因自我选择进入薄荷醇使用而产生的偏差。我们讨论了关于自我选择进入薄荷醇使用是否可能主要是准随机的几条证据线索。我们留给读者判断：是否存在令人信服的证据表明，基于内部性的市场失灵的不同水平足以成为拟议禁止薄荷醇香烟的充分理由。

30285.title: Were Small Businesses More Likely to Permanently Close in the Pandemic?
30285.zh_title: 小企业在疫情期间更可能永久关闭吗？
30285.authors: Robert W. Fairlie, Frank M. Fossen, Reid L. Johnsen, Gentian Droboniku
30285.abstract: Previous estimates indicate that COVID-19 led to a large drop in the number of operating businesses operating early in the pandemic, but surprisingly little is known on whether these shutdowns turned into permanent closures and whether small businesses were disproportionately hit. This paper provides the first analysis of permanent business closures using confidential administrative firm-level panel data covering the universe of businesses filing sales taxes from the California Department of Tax and Fee Administration. We find large increases in closures rates in the first two quarters of 2020, but a strong reversal of this trend in the third quarter of 2020. The increase in closures rates in the first two quarters of the pandemic was substantially larger for small businesses than large businesses, but the rebound in the third quarter was also larger. The disproportionate closing of small businesses led to a sharp concentration of market share among larger businesses as indicated by the Herfindahl-Hirschman Index with only a partial reversal after the initial increase. The findings highlight the fragility of small businesses during a large adverse shock and the consequences for the competitiveness of markets.
30285.zh_abstract: 先前的估计表明，COVID-19导致疫情初期运营企业数量大幅下降，但令人惊讶的是，关于这些停业是否转变为永久关闭以及小企业是否受到不成比例冲击的信息很少。本文首次利用来自加州税费管理局的涵盖所有提交销售税企业的机密行政企业层面面板数据，对永久性企业关闭进行了分析。我们发现，2020年前两个季度的关闭率大幅上升，但在2020年第三季度出现了强劲逆转。在疫情的前两个季度，小企业的关闭率增长远大于大企业，但第三季度的反弹也更大。小企业不成比例的关闭导致市场份额急剧集中于大企业，如赫芬达尔-赫希曼指数所示，且初始增长后仅出现部分逆转。这些发现突显了小企业在巨大不利冲击下的脆弱性及其对市场竞争力的影响。
30285.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PE, PR；JEL：H25, I18, L26

30284.title: World War II Blues: The Long–lasting Mental Health Effect of Childhood Trauma
30284.zh_title: 二战忧郁：童年创伤的长期心理健康影响
30284.authors: Mevlude Akbulut-Yuksel, Erdal Tekin, Belgi Turan
30284.abstract: There has been a revival of warfare and threats of interstate war in recent years as the number of countries engaged in armed conflict surged dramatically, reaching levels unprecedented since the end of the Cold War. This is happening at a time when the global burden of mental health illness is also on the rise. We examine the causal impact of early life exposure to warfare on long–term mental health, using novel data on the amount of bombs dropped in German cities by Allied Air Forces during World War II (WWII) and the German Socio-economic Panel. Our identification strategy leverages a generalized difference-in-differences design, exploiting the plausibly exogenous variation in the bombing intensity experienced by the former West German cities during the war as a quasi-experiment. We find that cohorts younger than age five at the onset of WWII or those born during the war are in significantly worse mental health later in life when they are between the ages of the late 50s and 70s. Specifically, an increase of one standard deviation in the bombing intensity experienced during WWII is associated with about a 10 percent decline in an individual’s long–term standardized mental health score. This effect is equivalent to a 16.2 percent increase in the likelihood of being diagnosed with clinical depression. Our investigation suggests that mechanisms such as the destruction of healthcare infrastructure, the increased burden on the healthcare system, and wealth losses during WWII exacerbate the adverse impact of bombing exposure on long–term mental health. Conversely, war relief funds transferred to municipalities following the war have a mitigating impact. Our findings are robust to numerous empirical checks and specifications. With the mental health impact of childhood exposure to warfare persisting well into the late stages of life, the global burden of mental illness may be aggravated for many years to come. Our findings imply that prioritizing children and a long–term horizon in public health planning and response may be critical to mitigating the adverse mental health consequences of exposure to armed conflict.
30284.zh_abstract: 近年来，随着参与武装冲突的国家数量急剧增加，达到冷战结束以来前所未有的水平，战争和国家间战争的威胁再度抬头。这发生在全球心理健康疾病负担也在上升的时期。我们利用盟军空军在第二次世界大战期间投放到德国城市的炸弹数量的新数据以及德国社会经济面板数据，考察了早年暴露于战争对长期心理健康的因果影响。我们的识别策略采用广义双重差分设计，利用前西德城市在战争期间经历的轰炸强度的外生变化作为准实验。我们发现，在二战开始时年龄小于五岁或在战争期间出生的群体，在晚年（50多岁到70多岁之间）的心理健康状况显著更差。具体来说，二战期间经历的轰炸强度每增加一个标准差，个体的长期标准化心理健康得分就会下降约10%。这一效应相当于被诊断患有临床抑郁症的可能性增加16.2%。我们的研究表明，二战期间医疗基础设施的破坏、医疗系统负担的增加以及财富损失等机制加剧了轰炸暴露对长期心理健康的不利影响。相反，战后转移给市政当局的战争救济基金则具有缓解作用。我们的发现对众多实证检验和设定均保持稳健。由于童年时期暴露于战争对心理健康的影响会持续到生命晚期，全球心理健康疾病负担可能会在未来许多年加剧。我们的发现意味着，在公共卫生规划和应对中优先考虑儿童并着眼长期，对于减轻暴露于武装冲突的不利心理健康后果可能至关重要。

30283.title: Adverse Selection as a Policy Instrument: Unraveling Climate Change
30283.zh_title: 作为政策工具的逆向选择：解开气候变化难题
30283.authors: Steve Cicala, David Hémous, Morten G. Olsen
30283.abstract: We propose a new policy instrument that leverages adverse selection when Pigouvian policies are infeasible or undesirable. Our policy gives firms the option to pay a tax on their voluntarily disclosed emissions, or an output tax based on the average emissions among undisclosed firms. We derive sufficient statistics formulas to calculate the welfare gains relative to an output tax, and an algorithm to implement the policy with minimal information. In an application to methane emissions from oil and gas fields, our policy generates significant welfare gains. Finally, we extend our analysis to the design of international carbon policy.
30283.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新的政策工具，当庇古税不可行或不可取时，利用逆向选择。我们的政策赋予企业选择权：要么对其自愿披露的排放量缴税，要么根据未披露企业的平均排放量缴纳产出税。我们推导出充分统计量公式，以计算相对于产出税的福利收益，并提出一种在信息最少的情况下实施该政策的算法。在应用于油气田甲烷排放的案例中，我们的政策产生了显著的福利收益。最后，我们将分析扩展到国际碳政策的设计。
30283.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D82, H2, H87, K32, L51, Q54

30282.title: The Impact of Climate Change on Mortality in the United States: Benefits and Costs of Adaptation
30282.zh_title: 气候变化对美国死亡率的影响：适应的收益与成本
30282.abstract: This paper reviews and extends the recent empirical literature on the impact of climate change on mortality and adaptation in the United States. The analysis produces several new facts. First, the reductions in the impact of extreme heat on mortality risk previously documented up to 2004 have continued up to 2019, consistent with continued investments in health-protecting adaptations to high temperatures. The second part of the paper examines the private and external costs of electricity generation and consumption related to high temperatures, a commonly-used proxy for measuring the consumption of adaptation services. Extreme temperatures increase electricity demand in the residential sector (relative to moderate temperatures), but not in the commercial, industrial, and transportation end-use sectors. The additional electricity demand in response to high temperatures results in significant external costs due to the release of local and global pollutants caused by the combustion of fossil fuels in order to produce electricity. These external costs, documented for the first time in this paper, are one order of magnitude larger than the private cost of adaptation associated with electricity consumption.
30282.zh_abstract: 本文回顾并扩展了近期关于气候变化对美国死亡率及适应行为影响的实证文献。分析得出了几个新事实。首先，此前记录至2004年的极端高温对死亡风险影响的减弱趋势一直持续到2019年，这与持续投资于高温健康保护性适应措施相一致。论文第二部分考察了与高温相关的发电和用电的私人成本与外部成本，这是衡量适应服务消费的常用代理指标。极端温度增加了居民部门的电力需求（相对于温和温度），但在商业、工业和交通终端使用部门并未增加。为应对高温而增加的电力需求，因化石燃料燃烧发电释放本地和全球污染物，产生了显著的外部成本。这些外部成本（本文首次记录）比与电力消费相关的适应私人成本高出一个数量级。

30281.title: Fear of Appreciation and Current Account Adjustment
30281.zh_title: 升值恐惧与经常账户调整
30281.authors: Paul Bergin, Kyunghun Kim, Ju H. Pyun
30281.abstract: This paper finds that limited exchange rate flexibility in the form of “fear of appreciation” slows adjustment of current account imbalances, providing a novel perspective on Friedman’s conjecture regarding exchange-rate flexibility. We present evidence that countries classified as more flexible have faster convergence than peggers for current account deficits, but not so for surpluses. An implication is that current account surpluses are more persistent than deficits on average. Evidence indicates that this asymmetry is associated with a one-sided muting of exchange rate appreciations. We develop a multi-country DSGE model augmented with a “fear of appreciation” policy rule, solved as an occasionally binding constraint. It can explain greater persistence of current account surpluses compared to deficits in general equilibrium where surpluses and deficits must cancel in aggregate.
30281.zh_abstract: 本文发现，以“升值恐惧”形式存在的有限汇率灵活性会减缓经常账户失衡的调整，这为弗里德曼关于汇率灵活性的猜想提供了一个新颖视角。我们提供的证据表明，对于经常账户赤字，被归类为更灵活汇率制度的国家比盯住汇率制国家收敛速度更快，但对于盈余则不然。这意味着平均而言，经常账户盈余比赤字更具持续性。证据表明，这种不对称性与汇率升值被单方面抑制有关。我们构建了一个多国DSGE模型，并加入“升值恐惧”政策规则，将其作为偶尔有约束力的条件求解。该模型能够解释在一般均衡中（盈余与赤字必须在总量上抵消）经常账户盈余比赤字更具持续性的现象。

30280.title: Natural Disasters and Municipal Bonds
30280.authors: Jun Kyung Auh, Jaewon Choi, Tatyana Deryugina, Tim Park
30280.abstract: Climate change is increasing the frequency of natural disasters, which could make municipal bonds a riskier asset class. We study the effects of natural disasters on municipal bond returns, exploiting the repeat sales approach to overcome the challenge that municipal bonds trade extremely infrequently. We find substantial price effects that materialize gradually: returns of uninsured bonds fall slowly in the weeks following a disaster, by 0.31% on average, translating into investor losses of almost $\$10$ billion. Source of bond revenue, bond insurance, disaster severity, federal disaster aid, and local financial conditions all affect the magnitude of the price effects.
30280.zh_abstract: 气候变化正在增加自然灾害的频率，这可能使市政债券成为风险更高的资产类别。我们利用重复销售方法克服市政债券交易极不频繁的挑战，研究了自然灾害对市政债券回报的影响。我们发现价格效应显著且逐步显现：在灾难发生后的几周内，未保险债券的回报平均下降0.31%，转化为投资者近100亿美元的损失。债券收入来源、债券保险、灾难严重程度、联邦灾难援助以及地方金融状况都会影响价格效应的幅度。

30279.title: Measuring Climate Change Impacts on Agriculture: An Equilibrium Perspective on Supply-Side Approaches
30279.zh_title: 衡量气候变化对农业的影响：基于供给侧方法的均衡视角
30279.abstract: A popular approach for estimating climate change impacts on agriculture is to rely on supply-side reduced-form regressions. These methods, which include the Ricardian approach, focus on how farmers and agricultural land market react to changes in climatic conditions, under the implicit assumption that crop prices stay constant. To test whether this assumption is innocuous, I use a quantitative trade model of global agricultural markets to emulate the findings of a supply-side approach as well as to calculate welfare changes accounting for price changes. The results show that both welfare measures are weakly correlated and can be of opposite signs, and that the supply-side approach tends to underestimate the cost of climate change. The main drivers of these differences are the neglects of the imperfect substitutability of crops in demand and of terms-of-trade changes. The supply-side approach provides a valid approximation of the welfare cost of climate change only if crops are almost perfectly substitutable in demand and trade costs are neglected, a situation in which it is reasonable to assume constant prices.
30279.zh_abstract: 一种流行的估算气候变化对农业影响的方法是依赖供给侧简化形式回归。这些方法（包括李嘉图方法）关注农民和农业土地市场如何应对气候条件变化，其隐含假设是农产品价格保持不变。为检验这一假设是否无害，我利用全球农产品市场的量化贸易模型来模拟供给侧方法的结果，并计算考虑价格变化后的福利变化。结果表明，两种福利衡量指标弱相关且可能符号相反，供给侧方法倾向于低估气候变化的成本。这些差异的主要驱动因素是对需求中农产品不完全替代性以及贸易条件变化的忽视。只有当农产品在需求中几乎完全可替代且忽略贸易成本时（此时假设价格不变是合理的），供给侧方法才能为气候变化的福利成本提供有效近似。
30279.meta: Programs：EEE, ITI；JEL：D58, F18, Q17, Q54, R14

30278.title: Pricing Power in Advertising Markets: Theory and Evidence
30278.zh_title: 广告市场中的定价权：理论与证据
30278.authors: Matthew Gentzkow, Jesse M. Shapiro, Frank Yang, Ali Yurukoglu
30278.abstract: Existing theories of media competition imply that advertisers will pay a lower price in equilibrium to reach consumers who multi-home across competing outlets. We generalize, extend, and test this prediction. We find that television outlets whose viewers watch more television charge a lower price per impression to advertisers. This finding helps rationalize well-known stylized facts such as a premium for younger and more male audiences on television. A quantitative version of our model whose only free parameter is a scale normalization can explain 35 percent of the variation in price per impression across owners of television networks, and aligns with recent trends in television advertising revenue. We use the model to quantify the impact of mergers and the effect of Netflix ad carriage on prices for linear television advertising. We then extend our analysis to social media markets where we find evidence of a premium for older audiences (who multi-home less), and we discuss implications for competition across ad formats.
30278.zh_abstract: 现有的媒体竞争理论表明，广告商在均衡中为接触跨平台多归属的消费者将支付更低价格。我们对此预测进行了概括、扩展和检验。我们发现，观众观看电视更多的电视媒体，其向广告商收取的每千次印象价格更低。这一发现有助于解释众所周知的现象，例如电视上年轻和男性观众群体的溢价。我们量化模型的唯一自由参数是规模标准化，它可以解释电视网络所有者之间每千次印象价格变异的35%，并与近期电视广告收入趋势相符。我们利用该模型量化合并的影响以及Netflix广告投放对线性电视广告价格的影响。随后，我们将分析扩展到社交媒体市场，在那里我们发现了老年观众（多归属较少）溢价的证据，并讨论了不同广告形式竞争的含义。

30277.title: Central Bank Communication with the General Public: Promise or False Hope?
30277.zh_title: 央行与公众沟通：承诺还是虚假希望？
30277.authors: Alan S. Blinder, Michael Ehrmann, Jakob de Haan, David-Jan Jansen
30277.abstract: Central banks are increasingly reaching out to the general public to motivate and explain their monetary policy actions. One major aim of this outreach is to guide inflation expectations; another is to ensure accountability and create trust. This article surveys a rapidly-growing literature on central bank communication with the public. We first discuss why and how such communication is more challenging than communicating with expert audiences. Then we survey the empirical evidence on the extent to which this new outreach does in fact affect inflation expectations and trust. On balance, we see some promise in the potential to inform the public better, but many challenges along the way.
30277.zh_abstract: 央行越来越多地接触公众，以解释和说明其货币政策行动。这一外联活动的一个主要目标是引导通胀预期；另一个目标是确保问责制和建立信任。本文综述了关于央行与公众沟通这一快速增长的文献。我们首先讨论了为何以及如何与公众沟通比与专家受众沟通更具挑战性。然后，我们调查了关于这种新型外联活动是否确实影响通胀预期和信任的实证证据。总体而言，我们看到在更好地告知公众方面存在一些希望，但沿途面临许多挑战。
30277.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：D12, D84, E52, E58, G53

30276.title: Blending Theory and Data: A Space Odyssey
30276.zh_title: 融合理论与数据：一场空间奥德赛
30276.abstract: This article describes methods used in the field of spatial economics that combine insights from economic theory and evidence from data in order to answer counter- factual questions. I outline a general framework that emphasizes three elements: a specific question to be answered, a set of empirical relationships that can be identified from exogeneity assumptions, and a theoretical model that is used to extrapolate from such empirical relationships to the answer that is required. I then illustrate the application of these elements via a series of twelve examples drawn from the fields of international, regional, and urban economics. These applications are chosen to illustrate the various techniques that researchers use to minimize the theoretical assumptions that are needed to traverse the distance between identified empirical patterns and the questions that need to be answered.
30276.zh_abstract: 本文描述了空间经济学领域中使用的方法，这些方法结合了经济理论的见解和数据的证据，以回答反事实问题。我概述了一个通用框架，强调三个要素：需要回答的具体问题、一组可从外生性假设中识别的经验关系，以及用于从这些经验关系外推至所需答案的理论模型。然后，我通过来自国际、区域和城市经济学领域的十二个例子来说明这些要素的应用。选择这些应用是为了说明研究人员使用的各种技术，以最小化在已识别的经验模式与需要回答的问题之间所需的理论假设。
30276.meta: Programs：DEV, IFM, ITI；JEL：B4, C1, F0, O0, R0

30275.title: College Costs, Financial Aid, and Student Decisions
30275.zh_title: 大学成本、经济援助与学生决策
30275.authors: Susan Dynarski, Lindsay C. Page, Judith Scott-Clayton
30275.abstract: The increasing tension between the perceived necessity of a college degree and the challenge of paying for it has led to a proliferation of financial aid policy in the U.S. and around the world. More students are receiving more aid today, and more different types of aid, than ever before. Half a century of policy experimentation has led to an equally impressive accumulation of research evidence, facilitated by methodological advances and the widespread availability of student-level administrative data. In this chapter, we present the economic rationale for financial aid, a summary of how aid works in the U.S. context, and common methodological challenges in the study of financial aid. We then review the evidence from both inside and outside the U.S. on the causal impact of a variety of financial aid policies and programs on students’ college decisions, attainment, and post-college outcomes, and summarize the overarching themes with respect to margins of impact, mechanisms, and heterogeneity. We conclude with a discussion of future directions for research.
30275.zh_abstract: 大学学位的必要性认知与支付能力挑战之间日益加剧的紧张关系，导致美国和世界各地经济援助政策的激增。如今，比以往更多的学生获得更多援助，且援助类型更多样。半个世纪的政策实验，加上方法论的进步和学生层面行政数据的广泛可得性，促成了同样令人印象深刻的研究证据积累。在本章中，我们介绍了经济援助的经济学原理、美国背景下援助运作方式的总结，以及研究经济援助时常见的方法论挑战。随后，我们回顾了美国内外关于各种经济援助政策和项目对学生大学决策、学业成就和毕业后结果因果影响的证据，并总结了关于影响边际、机制和异质性的总体主题。最后，我们讨论了未来的研究方向。

30274.title: The Effects of Teacher Quality on Adult Criminal Justice Contact
30274.zh_title: 教师质量对成年后刑事司法接触的影响
30274.authors: Evan K. Rose, Jonathan T. Schellenberg, Yotam Shem-Tov
30274.abstract: This paper estimates teachers' impacts on their students' future criminal justice contact (CJC). Using a unique data set linking the universe of North Carolina public school data to administrative arrest records, we find a standard deviation of teacher effects on students' future arrests of 2.7 percentage points (11% of the sample mean). Teachers' effects on CJC are orthogonal to their effects on academic achievement, implying assignment to a high test score value-added teacher does not reduce future CJC. However, teachers who reduce suspensions and improve attendance substantially reduce future arrests. Similar patterns emerge when allowing teacher impacts to vary by student sex, race, socio-economic status, and school. The results suggest that the development of non-cognitive skills is central to the returns to education for crime and highlight an important dimension of teachers' social value missed by test score-based quality metrics.
30274.zh_abstract: 本文估算了教师对学生未来刑事司法接触（CJC）的影响。利用一个独特的数据集，将北卡罗来纳州公立学校的全体数据与行政逮捕记录相链接，我们发现教师对学生未来逮捕概率的影响标准差为2.7个百分点（占样本均值的11%）。教师对CJC的影响与其对学业成绩的影响正交，这意味着被分配到高考试成绩增值的教师并不会减少未来的CJC。然而，那些能够减少停学率并提高出勤率的教师，则显著降低了未来的逮捕率。当允许教师影响因学生性别、种族、社会经济地位和学校而异时，也出现了类似的模式。研究结果表明，非认知技能的发展对于教育在减少犯罪方面的回报至关重要，并突显了以考试成绩为基础的质量指标所忽视的教师社会价值的一个重要维度。

30273.title: Digital Public Health Interventions at Scale: The Impact of Social Media Advertising on Beliefs and Outcomes Related to COVID Vaccines
30273.zh_title: 大规模数字公共卫生干预：社交媒体广告对新冠疫苗相关信念和结果的影响
30273.authors: Susan Athey, Kristen Grabarz, Michael Luca, Nils C. Wernerfelt
30273.abstract: Public health organizations increasingly use social media advertising campaigns in pursuit of public health goals. In this paper, we evaluate the impact of about $\$40$ million of social media advertisements that were run and experimentally tested on Facebook and Instagram, aimed at increasing COVID-19 vaccination rates in the first year of the vaccine roll-out. The 819 randomized experiments in our sample were run by 174 different public health organizations and collectively reached 2.1 billion individuals in 15 languages. We find that these campaigns are, on average, effective at influencing self-reported beliefs - shifting opinions close to 1% at baseline with a cost per influenced person of about $\$3.41$. Combining this result with an estimate of the relationship between survey outcomes and vaccination rates derived from observational data yields an estimated cost per additional vaccination of about $\$5.68$. There is further evidence that campaigns are especially effective at influencing users’ knowledge of how to get vaccines. Our results represent, to the best of our knowledge, the largest set of online public health interventions analyzed to date.
30273.zh_abstract: 公共卫生组织越来越多地使用社交媒体广告活动来追求公共卫生目标。在本文中，我们评估了在Facebook和Instagram上运行并通过实验测试的约4000万美元社交媒体广告的影响，这些广告旨在在疫苗推广的第一年提高COVID-19疫苗接种率。我们样本中的819个随机实验由174个不同的公共卫生组织运行，总共以15种语言覆盖了21亿人。我们发现，这些活动平均而言能有效影响自我报告的信念——在基线水平上使观点改变约1%，每位受影响者的成本约为3.41美元。将此结果与从观测数据中得出的调查结果与疫苗接种率之间关系的估计相结合，得出每额外接种一剂的估计成本约为5.68美元。还有证据表明，这些活动在影响用户如何获取疫苗的知识方面尤其有效。据我们所知，我们的结果代表了迄今为止分析的最大规模的在线公共卫生干预数据集。
30273.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D0, I0, M0

30272.title: Tertiarization Like China
30272.zh_title: 像中国一样的服务化转型
30272.authors: Xilu Chen, Guangyu Pei, Zheng Michael Song, Fabrizio Zilibotti
30272.abstract: This article documents a rapid shift toward services (tertiarization) of the Chinese economy since 2005, as evidenced by the significant increase in both employment and value-added shares of the service sector. Notably, our analysis reveals that a variety of measures of productivity growth have been greater in the service sector than in the manufacturing sector. Firm-level measures of dynamism corroborate this ongoing tertiarization trend, which is not limited to services used as inputs to industrial production but also extends to consumer services. These findings are robust across different growth accounting methodologies, including a recently proposed method by Fan et al. (2023) that addresses challenges associated with the measurement of quality improvements in service industries.
30272.zh_abstract: 本文记录了中国经济自2005年以来向服务业（服务化）的快速转变，这体现在服务业就业和增加值份额的显著增加上。值得注意的是，我们的分析显示，服务业的各种生产率增长指标均高于制造业。企业层面的活力指标也证实了这一持续的服务化趋势，这种趋势不仅限于用作工业生产投入的服务，还扩展到了消费服务。这些发现在不同的增长核算方法下都是稳健的，包括Fan等人（2023年）最近提出的一种方法，该方法解决了服务业质量改进测量相关的挑战。

30271.title: A Study of Bid-rigging in Procurement Auctions: Evidence from Indonesia, Georgia, Mongolia, Malta, and State of California
30271.zh_title: 采购拍卖中串通投标的研究：来自印度尼西亚、格鲁吉亚、蒙古、马耳他和加利福尼亚州的证据
30271.authors: Kei Kawai, Jun Nakabayashi, Daichi Shimamoto
30271.abstract: We apply a Regression Discontinuity based approach to screen for collusion developed in Kawai et al. (2022) to public procurement data from five countries. We find that bidders who win by a very small margin have significantly lower backlog than those who lose by a very small margin in the sample of procurement auctions from Indonesia, suggesting that bidders collude by bid rotation. Our results suggest that the proportion of noncompetitive auctions is at least about 5% for all E-procurement auctions and about 3% for all auctions in Indonesia. We cannot reject the null of competition in other countries.
30271.zh_abstract: 我们将Kawai等人（2022年）开发的基于断点回归的方法应用于五个国家的公共采购数据，以筛查合谋行为。我们发现，在印度尼西亚的采购拍卖样本中，以极小优势获胜的投标人其积压订单显著少于以极小劣势落败的投标人，这表明投标人通过轮换投标进行合谋。我们的结果表明，在印度尼西亚，所有电子采购拍卖中非竞争性拍卖的比例至少约为5%，所有拍卖中约为3%。在其他国家，我们无法拒绝竞争性原假设。

30270.title: Liquidity, Financial Centrality, and the Value of Key Players
30270.zh_title: 流动性、金融中心性与关键参与者的价值
30270.authors: Arun G. Chandrasekhar, Robert Townsend, Juan Pablo Xandri
30270.abstract: Consider an economy in which agents face income risk but interact in a stochastic financial network where the randomness is dictated by both chance and choice. We study the financial centrality of an agent defined as the ex-ante marginal social value of providing a small liquid asset to that agent. We show financially central agents are not only those who are linked often, but are more likely to be linked when (i) the realized network is fragmented, (ii) income risk is high, (iii) shocks are positively correlated, (iv) attitudes toward risk are more sensitive in the aggregate, and (v) there are tail risks. We apply our framework to models of financial markets with participation shocks, supply chains subject to disruptions, and village risk-sharing networks. We also study how the stochastic financial network structure influences bargaining, thereby endogenizing Pareto weights in the planner's problem. Evidence from Thai villages is consistent with these bargaining foundations, showing that agents who are more central indeed receive greater Pareto weight. We conclude by examining the welfare consequences of targeting larger liquid assets to key traders in markets, and to the most liquidity-sensitive links in supply chains.
30270.zh_abstract: 考虑一个经济，其中代理人面临收入风险，但在一个由随机性和选择共同决定的随机金融网络中互动。我们研究代理人的金融中心性，定义为向该代理人提供少量流动性资产的先验边际社会价值。我们表明，金融中心代理人不仅是那些经常被连接的代理人，而且更有可能在以下情况下被连接：（i）实现的网络是碎片化的，（ii）收入风险高，（iii）冲击是正相关的，（iv）总体风险态度更敏感，以及（v）存在尾部风险。我们将我们的框架应用于具有参与冲击的金融市场模型、易受中断影响的供应链模型以及村庄风险分担网络模型。我们还研究了随机金融网络结构如何影响谈判，从而内生化规划者问题中的帕累托权重。来自泰国村庄的证据与这些谈判基础一致，表明更中心的代理人确实获得了更大的帕累托权重。最后，我们考察了将更大的流动性资产定向分配给市场中的关键交易者以及供应链中对流动性最敏感的环节的福利后果。
30270.meta: Programs：AP, DEV, EFG, PE, TWP；JEL：D14, E44, G01, L14, O16

30269.title: Heterogeneity in Disease Resistance and the Impact of Antibiotics in the US.
30269.zh_title: 疾病抵抗力的异质性与美国抗生素的影响
30269.abstract: We hypothesize that the impact of antibiotics is moderated by a population’s inherent (genetic) resistance to infectious disease. Using the introduction of sulfa drugs in 1937, we show that US states that are more genetically susceptible to infectious disease saw larger declines in their bacterial mortality rates following the introduction of sulfa drugs in 1937. This suggests area-level genetic endowments of disease resistance and the discovery of medical technologies have acted as substitutes in determining levels of health across the US. We also document immediate effects of sulfa drug exposure to the age of the workforce and cumulative effects on educational attainment for cohorts exposed to sulfa drugs in early life.
30269.zh_abstract: 我们假设抗生素的影响受到人群对传染病固有（遗传）抵抗力的调节。利用1937年磺胺类药物的引入，我们发现，在遗传上更易感染传染病的美国各州，在1937年磺胺类药物引入后，其细菌性死亡率下降幅度更大。这表明，在决定美国各地健康水平方面，地区层面的疾病抵抗力遗传禀赋与医疗技术的发现起到了替代作用。我们还记录了磺胺类药物暴露对劳动力年龄的即时影响，以及对在生命早期暴露于磺胺类药物的队列在教育程度上的累积影响。

30299.title: Covering Undocumented Immigrants: The Effects of a Large-Scale Prenatal Care Intervention
30299.zh_title: 覆盖无证移民：大规模产前护理干预的效果
30299.authors: Sarah Miller, Laura Wherry, Gloria Aldana
30299.abstract: We examine the short- and long-term effects of expanded Medicaid pregnancy coverage to undocumented immigrants using a novel dataset linking California birth records to Census surveys and administrative records. We implement a mothers’ fixed effects design that compares changes in sibling outcomes across mothers with different likelihood of having undocumented status. We find the policy increased insurance and prenatal care among likely undocumented immigrant women and improved pregnancy outcomes. Later in life, our results suggest that their children may be more likely to enroll in post-secondary education and receive less public support.
30299.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个将加州出生记录与人口普查调查和行政记录联系起来的新数据集，研究了将医疗补助妊娠保险扩展至无证移民的短期和长期影响。我们实施了一个母亲固定效应设计，比较了不同母亲（其无证身份可能性不同）的子女结果变化。我们发现，该政策增加了可能为无证移民女性的保险覆盖和产前护理，并改善了妊娠结果。在生命后期，我们的结果表明，她们的孩子可能更有可能接受高等教育并获得更少的公共支持。

30298.title: Labor Misallocation Across Firms and Regions
30298.zh_title: 跨企业与跨地区的劳动力错配
30298.abstract: We develop a frictional labor market model with multiple regions and heterogeneous firms to study how frictions impeding labor mobility across space affect the joint allocation of labor across firms and regions. Bringing the model to matched employer-employee data from Germany, we find that spatial frictions generate large misallocation of labor across firms within regions. By shielding firms from competition for workers from other regions, spatial frictions allow low productivity firms to expand, reducing aggregate productivity. Overall, we show that taking into account the characteristics of the local labor market is important to quantify the aggregate losses from spatial frictions.
30298.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含多个地区和异质性企业的摩擦性劳动力市场模型，以研究阻碍劳动力跨空间流动的摩擦如何影响劳动力在企业间和地区间的联合配置。将该模型应用于德国的雇主-雇员匹配数据，我们发现空间摩擦导致区域内企业间出现严重的劳动力错配。通过保护企业免受来自其他地区的劳动力竞争，空间摩擦使得低生产率企业得以扩张，从而降低了总体生产率。总体而言，我们表明，考虑当地劳动力市场的特征对于量化空间摩擦造成的总体损失至关重要。
30298.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：J6, O1, R1

30297.title: Policy Uncertainty in the Market for Coal Electricity: The Case of Air Toxics Standards
30297.zh_title: 燃煤电力市场中的政策不确定性：以空气毒物标准为例
30297.authors: Gautam Gowrisankaran, Ashley Langer, Wendan Zhang
30297.abstract: Government policy uncertainty affects irreversible decisions including technology adoption and exit. This paper quantifies uncertainty surrounding the Mercury and Air Toxics Standard (MATS). We estimate a dynamic oligopoly model for coal-fired electricity generators that recovers generators' beliefs regarding future MATS enforcement. We develop the Approximate Belief Oligopoly Equilibrium concept where players understand that their decisions impact aggregate market states. MATS enforcement created substantial uncertainty: the perceived enforcement probability dropped to 43%. Resolving uncertainty early would increase profits by $\$1.39$ billion but also pollution costs by $\$0.652$–1.776 billion. Had exit been unlikely, resolving uncertainty early would have decreased pollution.
30297.zh_abstract: 政府政策不确定性会影响包括技术采用和退出在内的不可逆决策。本文量化了围绕《汞和空气毒物标准》（MATS）的不确定性。我们估计了一个燃煤发电企业的动态寡头垄断模型，该模型恢复了发电企业关于未来MATS执行情况的信念。我们提出了近似信念寡头均衡概念，其中企业理解其决策会影响总体市场状态。MATS的执行造成了巨大的不确定性：感知到的执行概率降至43%。提前解决不确定性将使利润增加13.9亿美元，但也会使污染成本增加6.52亿至17.76亿美元。如果退出可能性很小，提前解决不确定性本会减少污染。

30296.title: Sovereign Debt and Economic Growth when Government is Myopic and Self-interested
30296.zh_title: 当政府短视且自利时的主权债务与经济增长
30296.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Raghuram Rajan, Jack Shim
30296.abstract: We examine how a sovereign’s ability to borrow abroad affects the country’s growth and steady state consumption, assuming that the government is both myopic and self-interested. Surprisingly, government myopia can increase a country’s access to external borrowing. In turn, access to borrowing can extend the government’s effective horizon as the government’s ability to borrow hinges on it convincing creditors they will be repaid, which gives it a stake in incentivizing private production and savings despite its self-interest. In a high-saving country, the lengthening of the government’s effective horizon can incentivize it to tax less, resulting in a “growth boost", with higher steady-state household consumption than if it could not borrow. However, in a country that saves little, the government may engage in more repressive policies to enhance its debt capacity and spending. This could lead to a “growth trap” where household steady-state consumption is lower than if the government had no access to external borrowing. We discuss the effectiveness of alternative debt policies, including declaring the sovereign’s debt “odious”, debt relief, and debt ceilings.
30296.zh_abstract: 我们考察了主权国家在国外借款的能力如何影响该国的增长和稳态消费，假设政府既短视又自利。令人惊讶的是，政府短视可以增加一个国家获得外部借款的机会。反过来，获得借款的机会可以延长政府的有效视野，因为政府的借款能力取决于它能否让债权人相信他们会得到偿还，这使政府尽管出于自利，也有动力激励私人生产和储蓄。在一个高储蓄国家，政府有效视野的延长可以激励其减少征税，从而产生“增长提振”，使家庭稳态消费高于无法借款时的水平。然而，在一个储蓄很少的国家，政府可能会采取更多压制性政策以增强其债务能力和支出。这可能导致“增长陷阱”，即家庭稳态消费低于政府无法获得外部借款时的水平。我们讨论了替代性债务政策的有效性，包括宣布主权债务为“恶意债务”、债务减免和债务上限。
30296.meta: Programs：IFM；JEL：A0, A1, A11, A13, A14, F0, F02, G0, G00, L0, O0, P0

30295.title: Rise and Fall of Empires in the Industrial Era: A Story of Shifting Comparative Advantages
30295.zh_title: 工业时代帝国的兴衰：比较优势转移的故事
30295.abstract: The last two centuries witnessed the rise and fall of empires. We construct a model which rationalises this in terms of the changing trade gains from empires. In the model, empires are arrangements that reduce trade cost between an industrial metropole and the agricultural periphery. During early industrialisation, the value of such bilateral trade increases, and so does the value of empires. As industrialisation diffuses, and as manufactures become more differentiated, trade becomes more multilateral and intra-industry, reducing the value of empires. Our results are consistent with long-term changes in income distribution and trade patterns, and with previous historical arguments.
30295.zh_abstract: 过去两个世纪见证了帝国的兴衰。我们构建了一个模型，从帝国带来的贸易收益变化角度对此进行解释。在该模型中，帝国是降低工业大都市与农业边缘地区之间贸易成本的安排。在早期工业化时期，这种双边贸易的价值增加，帝国的价值也随之增加。随着工业化的扩散以及制成品变得更加差异化，贸易变得更加多边化和产业内化，从而降低了帝国的价值。我们的结果与收入分配和贸易模式的长期变化以及以往的历史论点是一致的。

30294.title: The Distributional Impact of the Minimum Wage in the Short and Long Run
30294.zh_title: 最低工资在短期和长期的分配效应
30294.authors: Erik Hurst, Patrick J. Kehoe, Elena Pastorino, Thomas Winberry
30294.abstract: We develop a framework with rich worker heterogeneity, firm monopsony power, and putty-clay technology to study the distributional impact of the minimum wage in the short and long run. Our production technology is disciplined to be consistent with the small estimated employment effects of the minimum wage in the short run and the large estimated elasticities of substitution across inputs in the long run. We find that in the short run, a large increase in the minimum wage has a small effect on employment and therefore increases the labor income of the workers who were earning less than the new minimum wage. In the long run, however, the minimum wage has perverse distributional implications in that it reduces the employment, income, and welfare of precisely the low-income workers it is meant to help. Nonetheless, these long-run effects take time to fully materialize because firms slowly adjust their mix of inputs. Existing transfer programs, such as the earned income tax credit (EITC), are more effective at improving long-run outcomes for workers at the low end of the wage distribution. But combining existing programs with a modest increase in the minimum wage generates even larger welfare gains for low-earning workers.
30294.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含丰富工人异质性、企业买方垄断力量和油灰-粘土技术的框架，以研究最低工资在短期和长期的分配效应。我们的生产技术受到约束，使其与短期最低工资就业效应较小以及长期投入替代弹性较大的估计结果一致。我们发现，在短期内，大幅提高最低工资对就业影响很小，因此增加了收入低于新最低工资的工人的劳动收入。然而，在长期中，最低工资会产生反常的分配效应，因为它恰恰减少了本应受其帮助的低收入工人的就业、收入和福利。尽管如此，这些长期效应需要时间才能完全显现，因为企业会缓慢调整其投入组合。现有的转移支付项目，如劳动所得税抵免（EITC），在改善工资分布低端工人的长期结果方面更为有效。但将现有项目与适度提高最低工资相结合，将为低收入工人带来更大的福利收益。

30293.title: First Foot Forward: A Two-Step Econometric Method for Parsing and Estimating the Impacts of Multiple Identities
30293.zh_title: 迈出第一步：解析和估计多重身份影响的二步计量经济学方法
30293.authors: Andrew S. Hanks, Kevin M. Kniffin, Xuechao Qian, Bo Wang, Bruce A. Weinberg
30293.abstract: Marketing and strategy researchers have often studied how organizations navigate multiple identities in relation to category spanning but extant literature pays less attention to understanding how individuals do so. Moreover, current econometric approaches only scratch the surface with respect to addressing the impact of multiple identities in professional settings. As a model domain to study labor market returns when individuals have more than one identity, we focus on interdisciplinary dissertators in the United States since evidence shows clear uptrends in dissertators engaging multiple professional identities and unclear trends in their outcomes. Our novel estimation method leverages a two-step process to characterize salaries of interdisciplinary dissertators as functions of the identities (academic fields) they acquire as graduate students. We estimate a first-stage regression of log earnings for monodisciplinarians on field dummies and respondent characteristics. After capturing the estimated field coefficients, we then regress log earnings for interdisciplinarians on linear and non-linear functions of these coefficients. Our estimates robustly reject the hypothesis that interdisciplinarians receive a salary premium. We also find evidence that the academic market, but not other employment sectors, particularly compensates researchers based on their primary discipline, an outcome that challenges emphases on interdisciplinarity. While our findings for interdisciplinarians point to the primary identity holding predominant importance for doctoral graduates in the United States, our two-step method provides a framework for parsing and estimating the varied impacts of multiple identities across a wide range of contexts.
30293.zh_abstract: 市场营销和战略研究者经常研究组织如何在跨类别背景下处理多重身份，但现有文献较少关注个体如何做到这一点。此外，当前的计量经济学方法在处理专业环境中多重身份的影响方面仅触及表面。作为研究个体拥有多重身份时劳动力市场回报的模型领域，我们聚焦于美国的跨学科博士论文作者，因为有证据显示，从事多重专业身份的博士论文作者呈明显上升趋势，而他们的结果趋势却不明确。我们的新颖估计方法利用一个两步过程，将跨学科博士论文作者的薪资表征为他们作为研究生所获得的身份（学科领域）的函数。我们首先对单一学科者的对数收入进行第一阶段回归，自变量包括学科虚拟变量和受访者特征。在获得估计的学科系数后，我们再将跨学科者的对数收入对这些系数的线性和非线性函数进行回归。我们的估计稳健地拒绝了跨学科者获得薪资溢价的假设。我们还发现证据表明，学术市场（而非其他就业部门）特别根据研究者的主要学科来补偿他们，这一结果挑战了对跨学科性的强调。虽然我们对跨学科者的发现表明，对于美国的博士毕业生而言，主要身份占据主导重要性，但我们的两步方法提供了一个框架，用于在广泛情境中解析和估计多重身份的不同影响。

30228.title: Producing Health: Measuring Value Added of Nursing Homes
30228.zh_title: 生产健康：衡量养老院的增加值
30228.authors: Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Neale Mahoney
30228.abstract: We develop a stylized model that allows us to estimate a value-added measure for nursing homes (“SNFs”) which accounts for patient selection both into and out of a SNF. We use the model, together with detailed data on the physical and mental health of about 6 million Medicare SNF patients between 2011 and 2016, to estimate the value added for about 14,000 distinct SNFs. We document substantial heterogeneity in value added. Nationwide, compared to a 10th percentile SNF, a 90th percentile SNF is able to discharge a patient at the same health level almost a week sooner, or one quarter of the median length of stay. Heterogeneity in value added within a market is almost as large as it is nationwide. Our results point to the potential for substantial gains through policies that encourage reallocation of patients to higher-quality SNFs within their market.
30228.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个简约模型，使我们能够估计养老院（“SNF”）的增加值度量，该度量考虑了患者进入和离开SNF的选择。我们利用该模型，结合2011年至2016年间约600万Medicare SNF患者的详细身心健康数据，估计了约14,000家不同SNF的增加值。我们记录了增加值的高度异质性。在全美范围内，与第10百分位的SNF相比，第90百分位的SNF能够在几乎早一周的时间内以相同健康水平出院患者，即中位住院时间的四分之一。市场内增加值的异质性几乎与全国范围一样大。我们的结果指出，通过鼓励患者在其市场内重新分配到更高质量SNF的政策，存在实现实质性收益的潜力。
